subject: Headline. After headline. After headline.

body:
MJ's closing the gap.

Look, Peter, you don't have to take it from us -- the latest reports all say that this race is getting tighter by the day. With polls showing this race as close as one point and as many as 36% of voters undecided, it's clear that every single vote is going to matter in Texas.

That's why your support has been so critical: the donations from this team have allowed us to run new TV ads across the state, reach out directly to contact voters, and connect virtually with hundreds of thousands of Texans. With a Supreme Court nomination looming, the stakes are too high to sit out this election.

You're the key to victory, Peter, and we're so grateful we can count on you.

**Pitch in NOW to help defeat Sen. Cornyn and flip the Senate!**

name: Wesley Hunt for Congress
subject: Hunt for Congress Weekly Update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
Friend,

As Tropical Storm Beta continues to advance toward the Texas Coast, I hope you and your loved ones are staying safe. We all know that these storms can be incredibly unpredictable and Emily and I are praying for those who find themselves in the storm's path.

I also want to begin by thanking everyone who came out for the Team Hunt Day of Action yesterday. I was blown away by the number of 7th District residents who showed up to help us block walk and phone bank. Your activism and enthusiasm speaks to the momentum our campaign is generating and affirms the 7th District's appetite for new leadership. Election Day is now less than 45 days away, and your support is helping to pave our path to victory.

On Monday, I was incredibly proud to receive the endorsement of Mattress Mack for my campaign in the 7th District. Mattress Mack is a true servant leader who works tirelessly to support the city of Houston. I am honored to have earned his trust and support and look forward to working with him to serve this great city.

[](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=800f7d464f72455583ae7d4173d13725&_e=gM2wtd3wsPxLKJnAjUQEqJMoS7CgejdRz1WfAH2YpBl-gD78dYLP6xvvkW-1HW0ku1KatIjRur_9wMxkUGJffBcky4hzQdf9QYnJWCqbGk3ANymqIdJLt6hbkjbpCWW-jU28bQdulFFJ0j-5VZSJ_Dcr8OauXTC_o_dswhZIReiXz-bjMbFD_5WEQ1gRE9AfvlA0TO9w8VKqB0sGyusfQ3rlQWkX2bu7d5LpfPEOWriUK19zUqmuUi89Uh5gjvE_p4bkXf0WGFeGqm17qpg72GvTBwTKkPguizIxB18Yxyn735HT301Td9q1oaorNBOy)

On Tuesday, I was honored to earn the formal endorsement of the Texas Fraternal Order of Police and its more than 15,000 members throughout the state of Texas. Our police officers wake up every day and fulfill their commitment to serve and protect our neighborhoods and our communities. We must honor their service and work with them to increase stability and security throughout our city.

[](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=800f7d464f72455583ae7d4173d13725&_e=gM2wtd3wsPxLKJnAjUQEqHqcPr-RfGryYhZRPujUOUXn0XPVXeLqYXLYz-Ic5-Od5zizQGjbnIorQPTV_Ijl1JHB_b6_RxQGxTWA-8EWGm2WbAHo8EAv_vX-sQQUttM5spXt_gRVq-Cc7vyKxlkghP_GiycW8eKXnBvotHvwVVSIFwxsHUZt3pvJTDonq-rgp1RxcAR62FOFOJDiVGKRnUbUHOBJ99j8yXvOdMUTnGKVIYLswt1LYENomMltCZ4KJK2OnCwNCE5c1tyEswY104r0HUY0rEyZ_zWXnoLpcwQcPbl_PjGMVVuHa7I6RN1N-LdSUBhRQ4JRxJ6LcR8Ao86CqD7TldXvhz7pjDD_giE%3D)
[Click here to view the full endorsement.](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=800f7d464f72455583ae7d4173d13725&_e=gM2wtd3wsPxLKJnAjUQEqHqcPr-RfGryYhZRPujUOUXn0XPVXeLqYXLYz-Ic5-Od5zizQGjbnIorQPTV_Ijl1JHB_b6_RxQGxTWA-8EWGm2WbAHo8EAv_vX-sQQUttM5EcAzGxcWGW9RtsnG9VMNTSxHx1JPjPIeI2rk-ViDvcOBL3y9OZzxfUefsL5WncllJrcpizV2vyiIwMgvDF8ic48tp0zFdQI91g6ObYe347IullW1Tw9r7OCGV4cnBGTR9T6ZR6S4pHQxcqnZ7znnomDF0PF47RdcoeEeNgd5pnEDc_lPZWjLtvnF_22YIreKniKfbagW96JXl_LqS8eCjvkcN6we17YV_B4b-W-LTgs%3D)

On Thursday, I joined the effort to fight COVID-19 by donating plasma for COVID treatments. As you may recall, this August my wife, my daughter, and I contracted COVID and now, I have the opportunity to join my fellow Texans in being part of the solution. If you are able, I encourage you to look into opportunities to donate plasma and help fight for those who have been impacted by this terrible disease.

There is still much work to do before November 3rd and there are many ways in which you can support our campaign. Whether it's putting a sign in your front yard or volunteering your time to block walk or phone bank, every contribution makes a difference. I am honored you have chosen to join Team Hunt and will continue to work to earn your support every day.

Thank you,
Wesley

****[CONTRIBUTE](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=800f7d464f72455583ae7d4173d13725&_e=gM2wtd3wsPxLKJnAjUQEqHRATmvEKMYdhuZNS8MkffkiL1T_hZvqeACGcINyE65-K00uffE0G2PSdRvPa5bLx87U7FhS-EDBNrKxnAvfyOUdGKtNm35pPGnAmSXO6WdC5odqxaqOOOIWwssLIO1KSuYHOnNUauDccXGK42d8zImlNDMOWThyaUdaMTo7NS2nXTZmYkitXPTCQoR0G92B3TQoy3Uk5FZNSBiYPYCMO3cSmbHMFm5TXcKqiX2a_eP-qinbXWImSr0RKbvTMOb1hHnE6hh84kgwocdtO74zCLU%3D)****

name: =?utf-8?Q?Troy=20Nehls?=
subject: Nehls News: Weekly Update from the Campaign!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nehls for Congress
body:
This week's update from the Nehls for Congress Campaign | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/f7d5cf9704f6/i-need-your-help-889034?e=e4728463fc)
---
| |
---
| | **Nehls News**
A Weekly Campaign Update
**_Leader McCarthy Rally_ **
Thank you to everyone who came out to support Sheriff Nehls and hear from Republican Leader Kevin McCarthy on Friday. The crowd and enthusiasm were outstanding! For those who couldn’t make it, here are some pictures of the event.

**_Blockwalking_**
Our team is hard at work knocking doors and connecting with voters across the district. If you're interested in block walking or making phone calls, please visit [_www.nehlsforcongress.com/volunteer_](https://nehlsforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f1efeb71566d5b848c6535fb5&id=29d25d5423&e=e4728463fc)

**_Signs are Back!_ **
We have yard signs at our Freedom Hall HQ, 1612 Crabb River Road, Richmond, TX 77469. Come on in and pick some up Monday through Friday 10 AM to 8 PM, or reply to this email, if you need help getting one for your yard.

_**Intern Profile – Montana Cortez**_

Hi, my name is Montana Cortez and I am an Intern Supervisor for the Nehls for Congress Campaign. I am currently a second-year law student at South Texas College of Law Houston. I studied political science at Texas A&M University which ignited my interest in campaigns.

Living in Richmond, I have a strong desire to see District 22 well represented in Congress and that is why I chose to work for this campaign!

Working on the Nehls for Congress Campaign has provided me with the experience I always hoped to gain. Getting to be a part of the behind the scenes of a campaign is truly rewarding. During my time with the campaign I have made phone calls to potential voters and gained insight on the process of what goes into a campaign.

Being a part of this campaign gives me a true sense of community and I believe that Sheriff Nehls is the best candidate for our District.

---

name: Mary Mancini
subject: a Republican court
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY, DR
body:
https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2]
Peter,
There are 42 days left before Americans get to decide this country’s future. Today I’m asking you to donate $42, and help raise the $9,435 we need to meet our September GOTV goal. From paid media to digital organizing, we need to make sure we do absolutely everything we can to encourage Democrats to show up and vote like their lives depend on it. [http://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2]
Last Friday, the passing of Supreme Court Justice Ginsburg reminded us of just how much is at stake this November. As a nation and a people, we are better because of RBG. Her legacy lives, and we intend to honor that legacy on Election Day. That being said, despite her dying wish to not be replaced until after American’s get to have their say, Tennessee Republican Senators Marsha Blackburn and Lamar Alexander have made their motives clear.
They intend to do everything they can to confirm whichever far right zealot Trump decides to nominate. They will pay no deference to the precedent set by their own party in 2016. This is corruption on full display and they don’t care. This is why we need to elect Tennessee Democrats.
Will you make a contribution right now, and help us Get Out The Vote? [http://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2]

Thank you,
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/77134/images/signature2.png]
--
Mary Mancini
Chair, Tennessee Democratic Party

name: Eugene DePasquale
subject: Can we talk about Christy Smith?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by DePasquale for PA 10
body:
We have to elect Democrats in every corner of the country who will go to Congress and fight to put hard-working people first -- including my friend Christy Smith in California’s 25th Congressional District.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19379952/252881007/267766766?refcode=em_fr_2020.09.21_b1_ed_all-nd&refcode2=01317d08-2bfc-ea11-96f5-00155d03affc&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMTMxN2QwOC0yYmZjLWVhMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-7C1aUSbwbUJt9dLPxE-Ldm3A8n3Eox2ovvwSyO0o34=) Friend, We are rapidly approaching the most important election of our lifetime, and this November we have the opportunity to elect leaders up and down the ballot who will create a nation that works for all of us.

**That starts with not only protecting our Democratic House Majority, but expanding it.** We have to elect Democrats in every corner of the country who will go to Congress and fight to put hard-working people first -- including my friend Christy Smith in California’s 25th Congressional District.

[**Friend, I’m reaching out to you today to ask if you would split a contribution of $5 or more to help me and Christy flip both of our seats blue and hold the House Democratic Majority this November.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19379953/252881008/267766766?refcode=em_fr_2020.09.21_b1_ed_all-nd&refcode2=01317d08-2bfc-ea11-96f5-00155d03affc&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMTMxN2QwOC0yYmZjLWVhMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-7C1aUSbwbUJt9dLPxE-Ldm3A8n3Eox2ovvwSyO0o34=) | [Donate Now »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19379954/252881009/267766766?refcode=em_fr_2020.09.21_b1_ed_all-nd&refcode2=01317d08-2bfc-ea11-96f5-00155d03affc&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMTMxN2QwOC0yYmZjLWVhMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-7C1aUSbwbUJt9dLPxE-Ldm3A8n3Eox2ovvwSyO0o34=)

While Pennsylvania and California are on opposite ends of the country, our communities are not so different, friend. The challenges that the people of South Central Pennsylvania face ripple across the country, especially now during this global pandemic.

**Take it from me, Christy Smith is the person to get the job done in CA-25.** She understands that public service means doing the most good for the most people, and has spent her time as an elected leader fighting for California’s families.

In Congress, Christy and I will work together to put people first and fight to hold big drug companies accountable, lower prescription drug costs, ensure health care access for all Americans, and build an economy that works for everyone. **But we’re counting on you to help us get there.**

clean_body: We have to elect Democrats in every corner of the country who will go to Congress and fight to put hard-working people first -- including my friend Christy Smith in California’s 25th Congressional District. = Friend, We are rapidly approaching the most important election of our lifetime, and this November we have the opportunity to elect leaders up and down the ballot who will create a nation that works for all of us. That starts with not only protecting our Democratic House Majority, but expanding it. We have to elect Democrats in every corner of the country who will go to Congress and fight to put hard-working people first -- including my friend Christy Smith in California’s 25th Congressional District. = | = While Pennsylvania and California are on opposite ends of the country, our communities are not so different, friend. The challenges that the people of South Central Pennsylvania face ripple across the country, especially now during this global pandemic. Take it from me, Christy Smith is the person to get the job done in CA-25. She understands that public service means doing the most good for the most people, and has spent her time as an elected leader fighting for California’s families. In Congress, Christy and I will work together to put people first and fight to hold big drug companies accountable, lower prescription drug costs, ensure health care access for all Americans, and build an economy that works for everyone. But we’re counting on you to help us get there. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = = Thank you, Eugene We know that COVID-19 has impacted so many in our community, and we have adapted our campaign to this changing environment. name: =?utf-8?Q?Gov.=20Phil=20Scott?=
subject: Voting Begins
body:
I know it’s hard to believe, but this week thousands of Vermonters will begin casting their votes in the general election. |
---
| | [ ](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=576e4f8af0&e=19cebfe173)
---
| Friend,
---
| I know it’s hard to believe, but this week thousands of Vermonters will begin casting their votes in the general election. Although my focus has been leading our state through these uncertain times, it is critical that we have the [resources needed to win this race](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=d07bf76208&e=19cebfe173). We cannot take anything for granted. The stakes are too high.

Together, we’ve accomplished a lot over the last four years, and even through this once-in-a-century pandemic, Vermont has led the nation.

But, there is still so much work to do to make sure we build back stronger than before.

[I know that times are tough, but if you’re able, I hope you can chip in to be sure we have enough to compete with my opponent.](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=2cc39c7610&e=19cebfe173)

If I’m successful, my priorities will continue to be growing the economy, making Vermont more affordable and protecting the most vulnerable -- because these are the guiding principles we need to build a more prosperous Vermont.

Thank you for placing your faith and trust in me.

Sincerely,

Phil Scott
---
| [DONATE](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=d79dafe739&e=19cebfe173 "DONATE")

subject: MJ on Rachel Maddow
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
Sen. Cornyn still hasn't spoken up.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891f36/7f51f7bc/45fb6734/4efa78de/413276059/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Peter, 18 days ago, we learned that the Commander-in-Chief called our veterans suckers and losers -- that he belittled their service, and attacked those who made the ultimate sacrifice for America.

In those 18 days, we've learned the depths of Sen. Cornyn's cowardice -- choosing instead to stand by the president rather than supporting our troops.

**[Watch MJ as she tells Rachel Maddow exactly what she thinks about this attack from the Commander-in-Chief, then pitch in to help her win this election:](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891f36/7f51f7bc/45fb6734/4efa78dd/413276059/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIxMzkifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalmaddow?refcode=email_20200921.1nd__2139__&amount=10")** | [](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891f36/7f51f7bc/45fb6734/4efa78dd/413276059/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIxMzkifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalmaddow?refcode=email_20200921.1nd__2139__&amount=10")

name: Tom Cotton
subject: Fill. The. Seat.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cotton for Senate
body:
I have big news to share. I have spoken with the White House and have taken myself out of the running for Supreme Court Justice. For me, the time is not right. But we know that President Trump will nominate a conservative to the Supreme Court and the left is FURIOUS.
[](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDM1MDczMDcS1&kn=17&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTg0MTc3MTY5NAS2&mt=1&rt=0)

Peter,

**I have big news to share. **

I have spoken with the White House and have taken myself out of the running for Supreme Court Justice. For me, the time is not right.

But we know that President Trump will nominate a conservative to the Supreme Court and the left is FURIOUS.

Liberals are threatening to riot, get rid of the filibuster, pack the Supreme Court, and even _impeach President Trump_ if we do our Constitutional duty to fill this vacancy.

My message to the left is clear: **We will not back down or be intimidated.**

Conservative voters elected us for this purpose. **We will fulfill our duty no matter what the liberal mob thinks.**

[**Peter, will you have my back as I work with President Trump and Senate Republicans to fill the seat?**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDM1MDczMDcS1&kn=6&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTg0MTc3MTY5NAS2&mt=1&rt=0)

After all, what more can the liberal mob do?

Remember, they're already:
* Rioting in the streets across the country
* Assaulting law enforcement officers
* Harassing private citizens and demanding they raise their fists in solidarity with "Black Lives Matter"
* Stalking politicians at their own homes
* Burning down buildings and looting stores

[](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDM1MDczMDcS1&kn=1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTg0MTc3MTY5NAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
_The violent liberal mob ALREADY rioting _

So when the left threatens to get upset if we confirm a Conservative, they should save their crocodile tears for someone else.

**I need your help to defeat the radical Democrats, who are raising tens of millions on the promise to stop us.** This fight will be tougher and uglier than anything we've seen.

[**Will you pitch in $100, $75, or $50 to help me fight back against the left during the confirmation process?**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDM1MDczMDcS1&kn=8&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTg0MTc3MTY5NAS2&mt=1&rt=0)

We cannot forget the lies and slander that Justice Kavanaugh faced during his confirmation hearings, we must be prepared again to fight back and win.

Peter, I hope you will have my back.
_****_
[Pitch In](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDM1MDczMDcS1&kn=3&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTg0MTc3MTY5NAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---

In service,
[](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDM1MDczMDcS1&kn=16&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTg0MTc3MTY5NAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
Tom Cotton
[](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDM1MDczMDcS1&kn=18&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTg0MTc3MTY5NAS2&mt=1&rt=0)

name: Mondaire Jones
subject: One step closer to saving the USPS
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mondaire for Congress_
body:
All election mail will be treated as First-Class Mail or Priority Mail Express...
#

**Huge news: we won our lawsuit to save the USPS.**
Here’s what that means:
* All election mail will be treated as First-Class Mail or Priority Mail Express.
* USPS will pre-approve all overtime pay for USPS employees between October 26th and November 6th, 2020.
* USPS will submit a list of steps necessary to restore on-time First-Class Mail and Marketing Mail delivery service.
* Mail carriers will be allowed to make late and extra trips to facilitate the prompt delivery of election mail.
* The USPS will work under the surveillance of a federal monitor who will hold them accountable to their promises.

In the midst of a global pandemic requiring more Americans to vote by mail than ever before, we are simply asking for a free and fair election. This is a huge step in the direction of ensuring the integrity of our elections.
Thank you for your support so far. Now we need all hands on deck to get out the vote and elect the Biden/Harris ticket and Democrats up and down the ballot.
Onward,
Mondaire
With this legal victory, Mondaire has already proven himself to be just the leader we need in Congress to fight for the integrity of our elections and the needs of working-class people — but we need your help to win in November.
**[Help elect Mondaire to Congress by making a donation to our campaign today. Your support ensures he can spend more time focused on the work you expect him to do.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19382523/252890827/462630069?refcode2=61195fa8-32fc-ea11-96f5-00155d03affc&refcode=em200921-c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MTE5NWZhOC0zMmZjLWVhMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QOv8Z4OygxD_FS5-ifz98NKb4wd0SO0stEZIJXNvUBk=)**

name: Rick Kennedy
subject: Just six weeks
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Kennedy for Congress
body:
I don’t have to tell you, but that’s not a lot of time. But there’s good news, this race is close, and there’s an opportunity for us to take the lead and win on November 3rd.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19382667/252891290/338717222?refcode=fl_email_fr_20200921midmonth3_RK_all_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NGViYzc1OS0zM2ZjLWVhMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xwyQOLSNkzKlZT3JVv9N27KINxpDtfbjP1sDmLV7cSI=)
---

Hello team -- **We’re just 43 days away from Election Day.** I don’t have to tell you, but that’s not a lot of time. But there’s good news: this race is close and there’s an opportunity for us to win on November 3rd. **That’s why we set up a mid-month fundraising drive to raise another $1,432 before midnight tonight. By hitting this goal, we can make sure that we have the resources to reach every voter.[_Can I count on your help today? name: Jon Ossoff (iPhone)
subject: Whatever it takes
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JON OSSOFF FOR SENATE
body:
It took my opponent less than 48 hours ... |
---
Friend,

My opponent, Senator David Perdue, was *adamant* in 2016 that no Supreme Court confirmation should proceed in a presidential Election Year -- he insisted it was a matter of principle.

**This weekend, after Justice Ginsburg's death, it took Perdue less than 48 hours to renounce his so-called "principles" and vow to help Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell ram through a new Justice this year.**

I'm not surprised. I never expected Senator Perdue to stick to his "principles." He has none.

This is the same guy who was buying stock in manufacturers of medical equipment and vaccines and dumping his casino shares while he told the public the risk from COVID-19 was "low."

Now he's desperate to confirm a Justice who will repeal the Affordable Care Act and overturn _Roe v. Wade_.

**[Friend, remember, Mitch McConnell's super PAC has spent more money against me than any other Democratic Senate challenger in America. The stakes have never been higher. Help me defeat David Perdue:](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2f4b/5b2c1286/3a22902d/25f3dfda/3664140764/VEsH/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_21_whtvr_it_tks?refcode=em_2020_09_21_whtvr_it_tks")** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

name: Holcomb Crew
subject: Hoosiers must join together and support small business
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana
body:
We’re doing everything we can to get Hoosier businesses #BackOnTrack, but we can’t do it alone. We need your help to keep our favorite... | |
---
| |
---|---|---
|
---
Friend,

**COVID-19 has hit small businesses across Indiana hard. **

Last week we received good news that Indiana's unemployment rate has dropped again (now lower than all of our surrounding states), but there's no doubt that the economic fallout from COVID-19 represents a daunting challenge for Hoosiers across our state.

That’s especially true for our small businesses – the shops on Main Street and our local Hoosier restaurants – who are responsible for more than a million Hoosier jobs.

_We’re doing everything we can to get Hoosier businesses #BackOnTrack, and we need your help to keep our small businesses open. _

Hoosiers are always stronger when we work together, and we all need to do our part to support small businesses.

Can we count on you to help us (safely) support our small businesses? Tell us below how you plan on supporting the small businesses in your community!
[ ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=fb1c59f1f30e40bf9754490bb16b643d&_e=GAKROMMinOSA_qDIEuBS7x_U9TF0rYX1BPkIGmRNI5aZfsSrbv-FR2jk_6Aurh-IJXcPEpAmcxudO4jJRvEFjku4jD7bjHrfmWtqC3Xk5M_BOga47ZaVH_yiHJtnBMW58HRYMSl1PLME7gI0ppOgQB3ldKh6Sq3oAEIn-xdKqPdmp-CwC7Syp028RoxqZ1cLPaomF_soGVW33nrGZdqt3Oy03Hg-e5wSrv9rcDJyM1uw47aB7jb8eRv8BeF-9j0JZMr_s6FowY-GAOWmTeZI1v2MhaQa10cgqUy2L34wxq3l-lI523h8nbBdvO42snemSFil02DH4klG3OASKbDSbVzG21TxazuID4BNSqwB3FRPztGAWZ_dtzRW3TklT8qQ-ypK9KMUP4RwEnIXpVz1Bs2p9cWh-OQM3FM5sPbkblmPasCf7vD-NJWJaags32lCxGKKMp8dYclf2TIc9xsqLvjdo0iS5dvVny0pNnVMyLmTcDsQSmJY47ZKjKjw5I3j)

name: Team Fair Fight Action
subject: BREAKING: 1.1 million Georgians requested mail-in ballots. Have you?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight Action
body:
|
---
[](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa4a4/34a064cc/1a2b3ca9/702d693/1231549547/VEsH/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://fairfight.com/")

| | Friend - Election Day is right around the corner and 1.1 million Georgians have already requested their mail-in ballots. Have you? Now is the time to make your voting plan. And if you plan to vote by mail, you can now request your mail-in ballot through Georgia's new online portal. Click [here](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa4a4/34a064cc/1a2b3ca9/702d690/1231549547/VEsE/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://ballotrequest.sos.ga.gov/") to request your ballot online now. Help us get the word out today by telling your friends and family they can request their ballots online at [https://ballotrequest.sos.ga.gov/](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa4a4/34a064cc/1a2b3ca9/702d690/1231549547/VEsF/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://ballotrequest.sos.ga.gov/"). For more information about voting in Georgia, you can go to [peachvote.com](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa4a4/34a064cc/1a2b3ca9/702d691/1231549547/VEsC/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "http://peachvote.com/"). And, for your friends registered in other states, you can direct them to [vote.org](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa4a4/34a064cc/1a2b3ca9/702d69e/1231549547/VEsD/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "http://vote.org/"). Questions? Call 866-OUR-VOTE (866-687-8683). Now is the time to make our voices heard and votes counted, so let's get it done. In solidarity, Team Fair Fight Action |
---|---|---

name: Corky Messner
subject: “Packing the Court”
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MESSNER FOR SENATE
body:
Tap or click to read more >>
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/13af923db088d66f/a764b169f961315ac3d6b838967d376c/33153) Peter, This election just became even more critical.

Jeanne Shaheen opposed both of President Trump’s previous Supreme Court nominees. Now that there’s another vacancy, she’s already said she opposes filling the seat. **I stand with President Trump in saying: FILL THAT SEAT!**

Shaheen is a 44-year career politician who’s done nothing but rubberstamp the Democrats’ radical agenda. And that’s exactly what she’ll continue doing if we don’t stop her in November.

If Democrats flip the Senate, they will end the filibuster. They will PACK THE COURT with liberal judges. And Jeanne Shaheen will not doing anything to stop it.
**I’m ready to jump in the fight here, but I need your help.[Can you chip in right now to help me save the Supreme Court?](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/13af923db088d66f/5bac4d9a489f8e1fc3d6b838967d376c/33153)** [Save the Supreme Court – Chip in now!](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/13af923db088d66f/3b3dd118ae0d2282c3d6b838967d376c/33153) An expanded Supreme Court packed with liberal judges would jeopardize our Constitutional rights, especially the 1st and 2nd Amendments.

It’s no stretch to say that the U.S. Constitution is now on the ballot in November. Shaheen has said she supports eliminating the filibuster before, and if we don’t defeat her in November, she will get her chance come January. **[Will you contribute right now to help me save the Supreme Court, so that I can fight back against Jeanne Shaheen and preserve our Senate majority?](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/13af923db088d66f/f6a2ed007b565855c3d6b838967d376c/33153)**

**There is so much at stake this election. We CANNOT allow the liberals and their chaos to reign**.

Please make a stand and help me win. Every dollar counts in the fight to beat the Democrats and their far-left agenda. [Save the Supreme Court - DONATE $100](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/13af923db088d66f/5e2b57afd10cfb4dc3d6b838967d376c/33153) [Save the Supreme Court - DONATE $50](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/13af923db088d66f/b029226551f36c9ec3d6b838967d376c/33153) [Save the Supreme Court - DONATE $25](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/13af923db088d66f/4fd32af0bb2fa1a1c3d6b838967d376c/33153) [Save the Supreme Court - DONATE $10](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/13af923db088d66f/b299f819dbe55098c3d6b838967d376c/33153) [Save the Supreme Court - DONATE $5](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/13af923db088d66f/f3c28859c44232ddc3d6b838967d376c/33153) Thank you so much for your support, Peter. I know that together, we can take on the radical left, and Keep America Great.

For our future, Corky Messner | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/13af923db088d66f/a8d1557cce8594b1c3d6b838967d376c/33153) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/13af923db088d66f/ecf5e3f074d85bf2c3d6b838967d376c/33153)

name: Matt Mowers
subject: Chris Pappas’ disgusting political stunt
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mowers for Congress |
body:
I still can’t believe he ACTUALLY did that... | |
---
Friend –

This weekend, I lost all respect for Chris Pappas.

Just hours after Justice Ruth Bader Ginsburg passed away, Chris Pappas sent a campaign email..._from Justice Ginsburg._
|
---
|
---
Even though I didn’t always see eye to eye with Justice Ginsburg, I had nothing but respect for her. She fought tirelessly for what she believed in and dedicated her life to the pursuit of justice. She was an incredible woman and an inspiration to us all.

...which is exactly why this stunt from Chris Pappas shakes me to my core.

**Using the death of an American icon for your own political gain isn’t just disrespectful - it’s disgusting.**

I hope that Chris Pappas feels deep remorse for his poor judgement and thoughtless actions. Justice Ginsburg’s legacy and the people of New Hampshire deserve better.

\- Matt
---
---
| |
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Tracey=20Mann?=
subject: Join Us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mann for Congress, Inc
body:
| | |
---
| | Friends,

We are less than 50 days away from the November 3rd election. Our team has been hard at work traveling all over the Big First District.
---
|
---
Tracey, Audrey, and the kids at the Pop Up 4 Trump Trailer eveing in Lebanon.
---
Tracey speaking at the Annual First District Old Fashioned Picnic in Phillipsburg.
| Our team members have also been working hard with state legislators across the district.
---
| |
---
Two members of our team spent a weekend in Hays walking with Rep. Barb Wasinger (House District 111).
---
|
---
We are working in conjunction with Rep. Paul Waggoner (House District 104), walking in Hutchinson.
---
| |
---
State Senate candidate Craig Bowser (District 22), members of our team, and volunteers walking in Manhattan.
---
| | This election is critical for the future of our country. Re-electing President Trump, electing Roger Marshall to the United States Senate, and electing Republicans to local offices is crucial to ensuring that our conservative values are represented in government.

My team and I are sprinting through this election. We need your help. Click **[here](https://traceymann.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60a16ea89a176679a5f31366c&id=3de798554d&e=a9d1410029) **to make a contribution or click on this **[link](mailto:info@traceymann.com?subject=I'd%20Like%20to%20Volunteer!) **if you’d like to sign up to volunteer.

These last few weeks have reminded me of how blessed we are to live in the United States. I’m more motivated than ever to leave an America for our children and grandchildren that is a more perfect union than we have inherited. **America is on the ballot this election. **

Thank you for what you do for your family, your state, and this country. Now, more than ever, is the time to stand up and lean in.

**[Join us](https://traceymann.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60a16ea89a176679a5f31366c&id=ee22853b20&e=a9d1410029) **in the fight.
---
|
---
| Tracey

name: RR via Team Sri
subject: For Texas to flip blue -- we must win TX-22
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sri for Congress
body:
Hi Friend,

Yesterday a new statewide poll showed that Joe Biden is hot on Donald Trump’s heels in Texas -- in a head to head match-up -- Biden trails by only 2 points!

But here’s the thing, friend: In order for Joe Biden to win Texas, Sri MUST win TX-22. And right now Sri is TIED with his opponent.

DONATE TO HELP US WIN >> https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sriq32020w?refcode=em_fr_2020.09.21_b1_rrvts_all&amount=25

It’s all hands on deck, friend. The consequences of November’s election couldn’t be more dire.

If Democrats are not able to successfully keep the House Majority and win the White House, we’ll be facing painful repercussions that will last for generations.

If we lose: In a matter of months we could see the repealing of the Affordable Care Act, the overturning of Roe v. Wade, the dismantling of Medicare, and the privatization of Social Security.

We’re not exaggerating, friend. This is the America we face if Donald Trump and House Republicans win big on November 3rd.
But if Texas flips blue, the math is clear: Joe Biden will win the Presidency.

So we have to start local, friend, and that means electing Sri Kulkarni to Congress here in TX-22, where he faces his own Donald Trump-like opponent.

Can you chip in just $22 to help us stay on track in these final 43 days?

>> http://secure.actblue.com/donate/sriq32020w?refcode=em_fr_2020.09.21_b1_rrvts_all&amount=22 <<

Thank you for stepping up. We need you.
-- Team Sri

Can you make it weekly?

Friend -- we’re less than 6 weeks away from Election Day, and every dollar that comes through the door is immediately going back out to help us flip this seat. Your grassroots donations have put us on the path to victory, but now we need you to double down.

Can you commit to a $5 or more weekly donation between now and November 3rd? Even $5 goes a long way!

MAKE IT WEEKLY ➜ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sriq32020w?refcode=em_fr_2020.09.21_b1_rrvts_all&amount=5&recurring=1

Sri Preston Kulkarni is a lifelong public servant and national security expert who has spent his career overseas working to protect Americans here at home. Growing up in Houston, Sri personally experienced the same challenges that our communities are facing today. In Congress, he’ll fight to lower the cost of prescription drugs, stand up to the gun lobby, address climate change, and bring common-sense solutions to Washington.

Help send Sri to Congress! ➜ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sriq32020w?refcode=em_fr_2020.09.21_b1_rrvts_all&amount=25

Bringing true representation to TX-22. Learn more at https://sri2020.com/

Paid for by Sri for Congress

SRI FOR CONGRESS
P.O. BOX 898
SUGAR LAND, TX 77487-0898 [#]

name: =?utf-8?Q?Coleman=20For=20Justice?=
subject: Josiah Coleman Earns Small Business Endorsement from the NFIB MS PAC
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Committee to Re-Elect Josiah Coleman and approved by the candidate
body:
I'm honored to have the support and endorsement of our small business community. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/12b885f42c55/josiah-coleman-earns-small-business-endorsement-from-the-nfib-ms-pac?e=933d5e1643)
---
| |
---
|
---
| | **NFIB Mississippi PAC Endorses Josiah Coleman**
Friends, Please see this important message from the NFIB Mississippi PAC. I'm honored to have the support and endorsement of our small business community.

Justice Josiah Coleman
---
|
---
|
---
|
## **2 Supreme Court Candidates Earn Small Business Endorsement **
**JACKSON (Sept. 18, 2020)** \-- The NFIB Mississippi PAC today endorsed Justices Kenny Griffis and Josiah Coleman for state Supreme Court. The political action committee is comprised solely of NFIB members in Mississippi. Griffis is running the 1st District, and Coleman is running in the 3rd District.

“Mississippi needs a Supreme Court that is fair and just but understands the issues facing the state's small businesses,” NFIB State Director Dawn Starns said. “We need justices who will maintain a level playing field and won't attempt to legislate from the bench. This is why the NFIB Mississippi PAC supports Justice Griffis and Justice Coleman.” Griffis said, “I’m honored to be endorsed by the NFIB, the voice of small business, and the thousands of people they represent across Mississippi. For our economic future, it’s important we have judges on our courts who follow the law instead of trying to legislate from the bench, and that’s what I’ve done during my 18 years of service on the Court of Appeals and Supreme Court. I’m asking for everyone’s vote so I can continue to serve in a way that treats everyone fairly, upholds our Constitution and protects the rights and liberties of our citizens.” Coleman said, “I am honored by the endorsement from Mississippi's small business community. Small business owners must have a court system that can be trusted to maintain the rule of law so that they and their employees can succeed in making Mississippi better.” Today’s endorsement puts the considerable grassroots support of the state’s small businesses behind the candidates' campaigns. Small-business owners and their employees vote in high numbers and are known for recruiting friends, family members and acquaintances to vote. NFIB will encourage its Mississippi members to help turn out the powerful small-business voting bloc on Election Day. **About NFIB** For more than 75 years, NFIB has been the voice of small business, advocating on behalf of America’s small and independent business owners, both in Washington, D.C., and in all 50 state capitals. NFIB is nonprofit, nonpartisan, and member-driven. Since our founding in 1943, NFIB has been exclusively dedicated to small and independent businesses and remains so today. For more information, please visit [www.NFIB.com](https://judgejosiahcoleman.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=02c6e22caa047d366ea08d990&id=f69c922b45&e=933d5e1643).

Small-business owners and their employees vote in high numbers and are known for recruiting friends, family members and acquaintances to vote. NFIB will encourage its Mississippi members to help turn out the powerful small-business voting bloc on Election Day. About NFIB For more than 75 years, NFIB has been the voice of small business, advocating on behalf of America’s small and independent business owners, both in Washington, D.C., and in all 50 state capitals. NFIB is nonprofit, nonpartisan, and member-driven. Since our founding in 1943, NFIB has been exclusively dedicated to small and independent businesses and remains so today. For more information, please visit . | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Paid for by the Committee to Re-Elect Josiah Coleman and approved by the candidate. Copyright © 2020 Committee to Re-Elect Josiah Coleman, All rights reserved.

subject: Law Enforcement chooses Nicole over Max
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NICOLE FOR NEW YORK (FEDERAL)
body:
Friends, I refuse to sit back while far-left Democrats call to dismantle our police departments, cause chaos in our streets, and destroy our economy.

| | Friends-

This weekend I was joined by the NYPD Police Benevolent Association, Sergeants Benevolent Association, Port Authority Police Benevolent Association, Detectives Endowment Association, and Lieutenants Benevolent Association and the Captains Endowment Association for a rally and Day of Action in support of my candidacy for Congress.

---
| | |
---
| | Law Enforcement chooses Nicole over Max

"I still don’t know who Max Rose is. Max Rose claims that he fought and he went up there and went against Pelosi, went up against the Democratic party, it’s all the same old. Nothing has changed with that individual and nothing will change with him if he’s voted back in again.... We need to put Nicole in office, we need to change things."

\- NYPD Sergeants Benevolent Association Vice President Vincent Vallelong

---
| | |
---
| | I’m proud to stand with our police officers and to be endorsed by every NYPD police union and six other law enforcement organizations.

---
| | |
---
| | [](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnc.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=305A487A1A6487)

| | |
---
| | We are just 44 days away from the most important election of our lifetime... it will be a defining moment of which direction our country will take. I refuse to sit back while far-left Democrats call to dismantle our police departments, cause chaos in our streets, and destroy our economy.

We MUST preserve the American Dream. We owe this to our children, neighbors, and future generations, but it cannot be done without law & order.

Max Rose not only turned his back on law enforcement, he turned his back on his constituents as well. When Max Rose ran for office in 2018, he portrayed himself to be a moderate Democrat who said he would stand up against Nancy Pelosi and work across the aisle. But we quickly found out that while he said one thing in district, he did another in Washington- voting lockstep with the Socialist Squad and Nancy Pelosi 97% of the time.

[With 47 days until the election, it is more evident than ever that this election will be about whether we are going to preserve the American dream or whether we are going to go down a path of socialism. Help me renew the American Dream, its limitless potential and opportunity.](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnc.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=305A487A1A6488)

| | |

| | So who is Max Rose? He’s a Pelosi rubber stamp who continuously puts politics over Staten Islanders and Southern Brooklynites by:

* Impeaching President Trump;

* Releasing convicted felons;

* Giving amnesty to gang members;

* Joining those who called to defund the NYPD;

* And supporting de Blasio’s plan to close Rikers, sanctuary cities and elimination of bail

Now more than ever I need your help to get our message out to voters in the last 44 days. Pelosi’s dark money PACs have upped their spending to run a smear campaign against me and buy our district. They’re desperate to keep power and the disgusting lies will only get worse.

[Please contribute ANY AMOUNT IMMEDIATELY to help get our message out in the last 44 days. It’s time we have a No Nonsense Leader who will stand up for us.](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnc.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=305A487A1A6488)

clean_body: Friends, I refuse to sit back while far-left Democrats call to dismantle our police departments, cause chaos in our streets, and destroy our economy. | | | | | | Friends- This weekend I was joined by the NYPD Police Benevolent Association, Sergeants Benevolent Association, Port Authority Police Benevolent Association, Detectives Endowment Association, and Lieutenants Benevolent Association and the Captains Endowment Association for a rally and Day of Action in support of my candidacy for Congress. | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Law Enforcement chooses Nicole over Max "I still don’t know who Max Rose is. Max Rose claims that he fought and he went up there and went against Pelosi, went up against the Democratic party, it’s all the same old. Nothing has changed with that individual and nothing will change with him if he’s voted back in again.... We need to put Nicole in office, we need to change things." \- NYPD Sergeants Benevolent Association Vice President Vincent Vallelong | | | | | I’m proud to stand with our police officers and to be endorsed by every NYPD police union and six other law enforcement organizations. | | | | | | | | | | We are just 44 days away from the most important election of our lifetime... it will be a defining moment of which direction our country will take. I refuse to sit back while far-left Democrats call to dismantle our police departments, cause chaos in our streets, and destroy our economy. We MUST preserve the American Dream. We owe this to our children, neighbors, and future generations, but it cannot be done without law & order. Max Rose not only turned his back on law enforcement, he turned his back on his constituents as well. When Max Rose ran for office in 2018, he portrayed himself to be a moderate Democrat who said he would stand up against Nancy Pelosi and work across the aisle. But we quickly found out that while he said one thing in district, he did another in Washington- voting lockstep with the Socialist Squad and Nancy Pelosi 97% of the time. | | | | | | | | | | So who is Max Rose? He’s a Pelosi rubber stamp who continuously puts politics over Staten Islanders and Southern Brooklynites by: Impeaching President Trump; Releasing convicted felons; Giving amnesty to gang members; Joining those who called to defund the NYPD; * And supporting de Blasio’s plan to close Rikers, sanctuary cities and elimination of bail Now more than ever I need your help to get our message out to voters in the last 44 days. Pelosi’s dark money PACs have upped their spending to run a smear campaign against me and buy our district. They’re desperate to keep power and the disgusting lies will only get worse. | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Sincerely, Nicole | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|---|--- | | | | | | PAID FOR BY NICOLE FOR NEW YORK (FEDERAL) Sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com Nicole for New York, PO Box 60487, Staten Island, NY 10306, United States

Our country lost a hero, a fearless advocate for justice and righteousness, and a trailblazing woman who suffered no fools.

The notorious RBG spoke out about the injustices in our society, and every day, she worked hard to make this country a better place for everyone.

Lujan always aligns himself with the partisan fringe of the Left and there’s no question that as a senator he would attack and smear qualified, conservative jurists while being a rubber stamp for activist liberal judges who want to rewrite the law, rather than interpret it. If you stand with my New Mexico first campaign, and against the toxic politics of Ben Ray Lujan, I need your help today. Thank you so much for your support, Mark P.S. I am so disappointed in Ben Ray Lujan. Not 18 hours after the announcement of Justice Ruth Bader Ginsburg’s tragic death, Ben Ray Lujan was using her passing to solicit campaign contributions. I am running to end this type of toxic politics. name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Citizens Fund
subject: Support President Trump’s nominee to the Supreme Court, & more. Week of Sept. 21st Action Items
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEA PARTY PATRIOTS CITIZENS FUND
body:
| |
---
With the news of Justice Ruth Bader Ginsburg’s passing, and the now-open Supreme Court seat, we now face an explosive new challenge, just over 40 days from the election.

Therefore, we have two main areas of action this week. The first one relates to the Supreme Court seat, and the second relates to the election.

_Note: in order to share the links below, simply open the link, and copy the URL address, and then paste it wherever it is that you are sharing it._
If you have a Republican Senator or two, you need to call them this week and tell them to support President Trump’s nominee to the Supreme Court and vote yes. This is their Constitutional duty and it is why the voters elected them. Tell them to stay strong and to fill the seat now, before the election!

If you don’t know your Senator’s phone number, you can use the Capitol Switchboard number. **Simply call[(202) 224-3121](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjY1LTFmMzM0NjdkOWY2ZDQwMjk5NDE2OThjOGQ3MjZmZjhi%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMA%3A%3AdGVsOjIwMjIyNDMxMjE_bWlkPTQyNjk4JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=fvq2Hq-YlL-24OKAJ7ThWQ "tel:2022243121") and ask for your Senator by name and you will be connected.** If you need to look up the name and party of your Senators, [use the map on this page](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjY1LTFmMzM0NjdkOWY2ZDQwMjk5NDE2OThjOGQ3MjZmZjhi%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMQ%3A%3AaHR0cDovL3d3dy5zZW5hdGUuZ292L3N0YXRlcy9zdGF0ZXNtYXAuaHRtP21pZD00MjY5OCZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=--WFHYRKlPsHhgWOLIM5-w). Just click on your state and it will show you your Senators.
|
---
IT’S TIME TO GET OUT THE VOTE!
We need volunteers to send text messages; phone bank; and download, print, sign, and mail letters to voters in critical swing states.

It seems like every day, there is a new article published about the left’s very public intentions to steal the election. The closer the vote tally is, the more likely the left will be able to use chaos, corruption, and violence to steal the election. So, we must all use every day from now until the election to get every Trump voter to vote.

**Please sign up for one or more Get Out The Vote efforts (text, call, or letters), and get every Trump voter you know to sign up too!**
[SIGN UP TO VOLUNTEER](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjY1LTFmMzM0NjdkOWY2ZDQwMjk5NDE2OThjOGQ3MjZmZjhi%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9mb3Jtcy5nbGUvZ1lhdGE2eDJLNktGSkx0SEE_bWlkPTQyNjk4JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=54kBFG1KOuDHXJR5Iz6m1w)
|
---
Sign Up to be a Poll Worker OR Volunteer to be a Babysitter
Babysitter? Yes, more on that in a moment.

It is not hyperbole to say that there really is a drastic shortage of poll workers. With all of the fraud and efforts to steal the election from the left, it is critical that Trump supporters fill those poll worker positions.

With many schools still being closed or only virtual, get your teenagers (or teenagers you know) to sign up if they meet the eligibility requirements! For instance, in some states, you only have to be 16 to be a poll worker. Plus, in most states, poll workers get paid, and what teen doesn’t want a little extra money?

Also, with many schools closed, parents who would have otherwise would sign up as poll workers may not be able to do so. If you are unable to be a poll worker, but are able to watch the kids for your friends or family so that they can be poll workers, please consider offering yourself as the babysitter!

**Note that NOW is the time to be signing up because there are usually trainings that you must be able to go through, and there will be deadlines for completing those trainings.**

Use our very short how-to guide to help you figure out the process of signing up, and get yourself, your teen, and your friends signed up!
[DOWNLOAD HOW-TO GUIDE](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjY1LTFmMzM0NjdkOWY2ZDQwMjk5NDE2OThjOGQ3MjZmZjhi%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly90cHAtcmVzb3VyY2VzLnMzLmFtYXpvbmF3cy5jb20vZG9jdW1lbnRzL1BvbGxXb3JrZXJfSG93X1RvX0d1aWRlLnBkZj9taWQ9NDI2OTgmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=9D0iXN4S155N41p2SWAXBQ)
|
---
Pledge to Vote in Person
The more mail-in ballots that are used, the easier it is for the left to steal the election. It’s as simple as that. The more ballots that need to be counted and are still coming in after Election Day allows the Democrats to “find” more ballots or use other tricks to steal the election from President Trump.

**The number one way we can stop this is to get as many voters to vote in person as possible. Therefore, if you are able, please sign this pledge to vote in person, and then make sure to do it!**

NOTE: If you are high-risk and need to stay away from public places for your health, or you live in a state where there is no in-person voting at all (like Washington state), this does not apply to you.

If President Trump can win on Election Day by a big enough margin, the left can’t steal the election.
[PLEDGE TO VOTE IN PERSON](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjY1LTFmMzM0NjdkOWY2ZDQwMjk5NDE2OThjOGQ3MjZmZjhi%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly92b3RlaW5wZXJzb24uYWN0LnRlYXBhcnR5cGF0cmlvdHMub3JnLz9taWQ9NDI2OTgmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=yBQDC0RZ2mCShM50WyDxiw)
|
---
Make Real Civics Education a Priority Again
Week of September 21st
Keep an eye out every week for a new activity or book or lesson to bring real civics back to our children.

**This week, we are referring you to the newly launched[1776 Unites Curriculum](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjY1LTFmMzM0NjdkOWY2ZDQwMjk5NDE2OThjOGQ3MjZmZjhi%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly8xNzc2dW5pdGVzLmNvbS9vdXItd29yay9jdXJyaWN1bHVtLz9taWQ9NDI2OTgmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=cLHhTj8PMlNCpK5-jZlkqQ) that Civil Rights leader Bob Woodson and others just released last week. Their goal is to counter the deceitful and divisive “1619 Project” from the New York Times.**

Currently, the “1619 Project” curriculum has infiltrated over 4,500 schools across the country. 1776 Unites began as a response to the “1619 Project” and have been providing commentary and op-eds for months. Now, they have launched a fantastic high school curriculum as well; their K-8 curriculum modules are coming soon.

We encourage you to sign up (**it’s FREE!**) to get the modules if you have a high schooler, as well as pushing your local schools to adopt the modules. Here’s a short description of the curriculum:

The 1776 Unites curriculum offers authentic, inspiring stories from American history that show what is best in our national character and what our freedom makes possible even in the most difficult circumstances. 1776 Unites maintains a special focus on stories that celebrate black excellence, reject victimhood culture, and showcase African-Americans who have prospered by embracing America’s founding ideals.
_The 1776 Unites curriculum offers authentic, inspiring stories from American history that show what is best in our national character and what our freedom makes possible even in the most difficult circumstances. 1776 Unites maintains a special focus on stories that celebrate black excellence, reject victimhood culture, and showcase African-Americans who have prospered by embracing America’s founding ideals._

Jenny Beth

subject: Here's what will happen if we lose.

body:
Bill Olson for Congress

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=h57chHnaeF6OuRU&b=RS9vBWbZ2OJzN3MdnORk9g

Hi Peter,

My name is Bill Olson, and I am a conservative Christian combat vet who just won big in my primary! I am a Trump supporter and a patriot! I will not let the Left destroy this country over their own inability to live peaceably alongside conservatives!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=h57chHnaeF6OuRU&b=RS9vBWbZ2OJzN3MdnORk9g

The passing of Justice Ruth Bader Ginsburg has thrown the Left into hysterics. These people, who have been burning down cities and assaulting or murdering anyone who disagreed with them, now are threatening the integrity of our Republic if Biden doesn't win and they don't get to choose RBG's replacement.

These people are too much! If this doesn't get every Republican out and voting, I don't know what will:

A leading Democrat in the U.S. Senate came out in support of "packing" the U.S. Supreme Court and eliminating the Senate filibuster if Majority Leader Mitch McConnell works to confirm a potential nominee to fill the seat left by Justice Ruth Bader Ginsburg.

Ginsburg died Friday at 87 after a difficult battle with metastatic pancreatic cancer.

Nine justices have served on the nation's highest court since 1869. Before that, the number of justices changed six times, with the maximum number being 10 during the Civil War.

The filibuster is a threshold of 60 votes that's necessary before a piece of legislation is given an up or down vote.

The extremist Democrats are not going to go quietly into the night. We loyal patriots who are NOT socialists must stand up to them, and quickly! They will legislate our rights away as soon as they get power.

Just look at the words of Marxist Socialist AOC, and see if this doesn't send chills down your spine:

As Republicans show support for moving forward with a Supreme Court nominee quickly, @AOC tells me if that happens, “we should leave all options on the table, including the number of Justices that are on the Supreme Court.” Adds expanding is “absolutely” an option worth weighing.

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=h57chHnaeF6OuRU&b=RS9vBWbZ2OJzN3MdnORk9g

Is this what you want? You want AOC and Chuck Schumer messing with our institutions so they can get the Socialist paradise they want?

America can only withstand the extremism of the far-Left if our institutions remain standing.

But the extremist Democrats want to destroy our institutions if they don't get their way- and THAT, we cannot allow to happen.

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=h57chHnaeF6OuRU&b=RS9vBWbZ2OJzN3MdnORk9g

I won't let it happen. I have taken an oath to the United States Constitution, defending her against all foes foreign OR domestic! I am a patriot and I need your help to beat the far Left!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=h57chHnaeF6OuRU&b=RS9vBWbZ2OJzN3MdnORk9g

Americans rightly mourn for the departed Supreme Court Justice. We are a kind and decent people, and that is what we do.

What we do NOT do, is change our institutions because one political party goes nuts with intolerance. And that is what the far-Left wants to do.

If we want to defend our Constitution against the encroachment by the extreme Left, we must stand together NOW!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=h57chHnaeF6OuRU&b=RS9vBWbZ2OJzN3MdnORk9g

The Democrats can only pack the Supreme Court if they hold the House. If Republicans take Congress from Nancy Pelosi's Democrats, it's all over for their unconstitutional aspirations.

If I win, Nancy Pelosi will almost certainly not be speaker. Help me now!

I need your help to stand up FOR the Constitution and AGAINST the far Left!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=h57chHnaeF6OuRU&b=RS9vBWbZ2OJzN3MdnORk9g

Can you help me?

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=h57chHnaeF6OuRU&b=RS9vBWbZ2OJzN3MdnORk9g
This is a swing suburban district and we can take it back! Can I count on you for a donation

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=h57chHnaeF6OuRU&b=RS9vBWbZ2OJzN3MdnORk9g
today? Time is running out- that's why I need your help today!

I'm going to make sure the radical Democrats like Biden and Soto lose BIG this year - with your help!

Let's get this done!

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=h57chHnaeF6OuRU&b=RS9vBWbZ2OJzN3MdnORk9g

Bill Olson

Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars

Supports President Trump

Not a Career Politician

Hard Core Conservative Fighter

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=h57chHnaeF6OuRU&b=RS9vBWbZ2OJzN3MdnORk9g

P.S. I really need your help today

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=h57chHnaeF6OuRU&b=RS9vBWbZ2OJzN3MdnORk9g
, so a conservative combat vet can retake this swing district that the Republicans held just earlier this decade. I can do this - WITH YOUR HELP!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=h57chHnaeF6OuRU&b=RS9vBWbZ2OJzN3MdnORk9g
Thank you and God bless America! - Bill.

name: Sandy Smith
subject: Peace Through Strength
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SANDY SMITH FOR CONGRESS INC
body:
| | | [ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=h_aXAIHPX3Nxmng&b=Kj7xDfGL4jsxEtLT0WsTNg)
---

Dear Peter,

**I am Sandy Smith, the Republican nominee for Congress in North Carolina’s newly redrawn 1st Congressional district. I am a pro-Trump Republican who is proud to run with our President in 2020.**

I'm especially proud of the foreign policy successes our President has had on the foreign policy stage. Who would have thought that, in 2020 of all years, the President would have THIS many astounding foreign policy achievements?
_Do you remember when the Democrats and the Fake News Media tried to sell us the lie that Trump would start a nuclear war or something? All those people do is lie- you can never believe them!!!_
Check out this summer:
-Brokered a peace deal between the United Arab Emirates and Israel;
-Brokered a peace deal in the Balkans;
-Arranged ANOTHER Mideast peace deal between Israel and Bahrain.
_Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu said the agreement will bring economic benefits to the region and it could end the Arab-Israeli conflict.
'The blessings of the peace we make today will be enormous. First, because this peace will eventually expand to include other Arab states. And ultimately, it can end the Arab-Israeli conflict, once and for all,' he said._
_'Second, because the great economic benefits of our partnership will be felt throughout our region. And they will reach every one of our citizens. And third, because this is not only a peace between leaders. It's a peace between people,' he added._
_United Arab Emirates Foreign Minister Abdullah bin Zayed al-Nahyan said the deal was a sign of the change of heart taking place in the Middle East.
'We are already witnessing a change in the heart of the Middle East, a change that will send hope, around the world,' he said._
_Each of the four leaders signed four copies of the Abraham Accords - one in English, one in Hebrew and two in Arabic._
_The leaders also signed a a treaty of peace, diplomatic relations and full normalization and a declaration of peace - three copies of each were signed, one in English, one in Arabic and one in Hebrew. _
Peace in the Middle East with NO blood in the sand. How often do we see this?!?

[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=h_aXAIHPX3Nxmng&b=Kj7xDfGL4jsxEtLT0WsTNg)
---

**_But wait there's more- President Trump was nominated for the Nobel Peace Prize for securing peace in the Balkans!_**

_A Swedish lawmaker said Friday that he has nominated the governments of the United States, Kosovo and Serbia for the Nobel Peace Prize for their efforts to secure a peace agreement between the two former Balkan war foes._

_Swedish parliament member Magnus Jacobsson tweeted that he nominated the three governments “for their joint work for peace and economic development, through the cooperation agreement signed in the White House. Trade and communications are important building blocks for peace.”_

_Serbian President Aleksander Vucic and Kosovo Prime Minister Avdullah Hoti signed an economic normalization deal at the White House last week that also calls for Belgrade to move its embassy in Israel to Jerusalem and for mutual recognition by Israel and Kosovo._

_How could we not want to run with President Trump this year? This man is bringing peace to the Middle East and the Balkans! Who else has done that???_

The President can win North Carolina, and I can help him by winning my swing district! [Can you help me win with the President?](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=h_aXAIHPX3Nxmng&b=Kj7xDfGL4jsxEtLT0WsTNg)

I stand with our President. His leadership has been outstanding and exceptional!

**Pelosi's Democrats will never help our country like the President has. I'm facing her Deputy Whip- and this fight isn't easy. I've fought him tooth and nail to this point, and I can win this thing, but I need a push from patriots like you!**

[If you also support the President, I need your help to beat Pelosi's deputy whip Butterfield!](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=h_aXAIHPX3Nxmng&b=Kj7xDfGL4jsxEtLT0WsTNg) Unlike Pelosi and Butterfield, I stand with Trump! This is a crazy year, but let's make sure the President and his supporters win!

[Can you help me take this swing district back](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=h_aXAIHPX3Nxmng&b=Kj7xDfGL4jsxEtLT0WsTNg), with your best and immediate contribution of $15, $35, or $250? Taking out my opponent, one of Pelosi’s leading lieutenants, would be a crippling blow to the Democrat Socialists and to Nancy Pelosi’s agenda.

G.K. Butterfield;s record is awful, but to replace him I [really need you today](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=h_aXAIHPX3Nxmng&b=Kj7xDfGL4jsxEtLT0WsTNg)! Let's stand up to these hypocrites now, before it's too late!

For God and Country,

clean_body: | | | Dear Peter, I am Sandy Smith, the Republican nominee for Congress in North Carolina’s newly redrawn 1st Congressional district. I am a pro-Trump Republican who is proud to run with our President in 2020. I'm especially proud of the foreign policy successes our President has had on the foreign policy stage. Who would have thought that, in 2020 of all years, the President would have THIS many astounding foreign policy achievements? Do you remember when the Democrats and the Fake News Media tried to sell us the lie that Trump would start a nuclear war or something? All those people do is lie- you can never believe them!!! Check out this summer: -Brokered a peace deal between the United Arab Emirates and Israel; -Brokered a peace deal in the Balkans; -Arranged ANOTHER Mideast peace deal between Israel and Bahrain. Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu said the agreement will bring economic benefits to the region and it could end the Arab-Israeli conflict. 'The blessings of the peace we make today will be enormous. First, because this peace will eventually expand to include other Arab states. And ultimately, it can end the Arab-Israeli conflict, once and for all,' he said. 'Second, because the great economic benefits of our partnership will be felt throughout our region. And they will reach every one of our citizens. And third, because this is not only a peace between leaders. It's a peace between people,' he added. United Arab Emirates Foreign Minister Abdullah bin Zayed al-Nahyan said the deal was a sign of the change of heart taking place in the Middle East. 'We are already witnessing a change in the heart of the Middle East, a change that will send hope, around the world,' he said. Each of the four leaders signed four copies of the Abraham Accords - one in English, one in Hebrew and two in Arabic. The leaders also signed a a treaty of peace, diplomatic relations and full normalization and a declaration of peace - three copies of each were signed, one in English, one in Arabic and one in Hebrew. Peace in the Middle East with NO blood in the sand. How often do we see this?!? But wait there's more- President Trump was nominated for the Nobel Peace Prize for securing peace in the Balkans! A Swedish lawmaker said Friday that he has nominated the governments of the United States, Kosovo and Serbia for the Nobel Peace Prize for their efforts to secure a peace agreement between the two former Balkan war foes. Swedish parliament member Magnus Jacobsson tweeted that he nominated the three governments “for their joint work for peace and economic development, through the cooperation agreement signed in the White House. Trade and communications are important building blocks for peace.” Serbian President Aleksander Vucic and Kosovo Prime Minister Avdullah Hoti signed an economic normalization deal at the White House last week that also calls for Belgrade to move its embassy in Israel to Jerusalem and for mutual recognition by Israel and Kosovo. How could we not want to run with President Trump this year? This man is bringing peace to the Middle East and the Balkans! Who else has done that??? The President can win North Carolina, and I can help him by winning my swing district! I stand with our President. His leadership has been outstanding and exceptional! Pelosi's Democrats will never help our country like the President has. I'm facing her Deputy Whip- and this fight isn't easy. I've fought him tooth and nail to this point, and I can win this thing, but I need a push from patriots like you! Unlike Pelosi and Butterfield, I stand with Trump! This is a crazy year, but let's make sure the President and his supporters win! , with your best and immediate contribution of $15, $35, or $250? Taking out my opponent, one of Pelosi’s leading lieutenants, would be a crippling blow to the Democrat Socialists and to Nancy Pelosi’s agenda. G.K. Butterfield;s record is awful, but to replace him I ! Let's stand up to these hypocrites now, before it's too late! For God and Country, Sandy Smith Republican for Congress, North Carolina's new First District Conservative Entrepreneur & Military mom P.S. I need to reach my goal to catch up with Butterfield. PAID FOR BY SANDY SMITH FOR CONGRESS INC P.O. Box 434 Winterville NC 28590 USA |

name: =?utf-8?Q?Pat=20Hackett?=
subject: Protect SCOTUS
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pat Hackett for Congress
body:
Jackie Walorski wasted no time completely disregarding RBG's dying request and dishonoring her legacy by calling for a quick replacement. | | | | [ ](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=3bc5a033f2&e=5886ca081d)
---
| | | Dear Friend,

This weekend we honored the life and legacy of Justice Ruth Bader Ginsburg. Less than a day after she passed, Jackie Walorski called on President Trump to nominate a new justice “without delay.”

[Jackie Walorski dishonors Justice Ginsburg.](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=1e8d4c21ae&e=5886ca081d) In her last days, Justice Ginsburg said, "My most fervent wish is that I will not be replaced until a new president is installed." Jackie Walorski wasted no time completely disregarding Justice Ginsburg's dying request and dishonoring her legacy by calling for a quick replacement.

**[Jackie's Walorski’s blatant hypocrisy is disgraceful.](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=d90e395044&e=5886ca081d) **In 2016, Republicans refused to even consider President Obama's nomination of Judge Merrick Garland to the Supreme Court when there was a vacancy 10 months before the election, saying that a new justice should not be appointed until after the election. Yet only 44 days until November 3, Jackie Walorski is calling for a new justice to be rushed through the confirmation process. Her duplicity is shameful.

[Jackie Walorski is damaging our nation and the integrity of the Supreme Court.](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=d9f7600940&e=5886ca081d) Jackie Walorski is attempting to subvert our democracy by ramrodding a nominee, who will have lifetime tenure on our nation's highest court, through the confirmation process. This cheapens the ideal of justice in our country, is an affront to a representative democracy, and actively damages our nation's faith in one of our most hallowed institutions.

[**Jackie Walorski does not stand for justice. We must protect the integrity of the Supreme Court. **](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=6705f0ef5e&e=5886ca081d)
---

---
| _If you’ve saved your information with ActBlue, your donation will go through automatically. _

Together we will carry forward Justice Ginsburg's fierce devotion to justice. Much will be required of us in the days to come. Let's get to work.

Team Hackett

name: Mark Warner Survey Team
subject: Add your name to oppose offshore drilling in VA
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
a threat to our Naval operations and tourism industry
|
---

| | Derek --

**Communities up and down the coast of Virginia have made it perfectly clear:** Offshore drilling poses a threat to coastal communities.

When the Trump administration announced their plans to drill off the coast of Virginia, Sen. Warner rushed to bring together his colleagues from both sides of the aisle to oppose any new drilling. Drilling off Virginia's eastern shore would disrupt fragile natural ecosystems, threaten important naval operations, stymie the work of NASA at Wallops Island, and cause outdoor recreation and aquaculture to suffer.

Sen. Mark Warner will continue to oppose expanded drilling proposals in the Senate to protect Virginia's natural beauty and outdoor tourism industries.

**[Will you join him in signing our petition to oppose offshore drilling in Virginia?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85daac/53d9897e/559ed190/1c881286/316414784/VEsH/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/s/warner-drilling")**

Thank you for your support,
Team Warner

name: Nina Ahmad
subject: County to County, Help Keep Nina On The Road
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nina for PA
body:
| | Dear , Nina Ahmad is running for Pennsylvania Auditor General to ensure your tax dollars are used with integrity and be the fiscal watchdog that protects all of us. Team Nina over the past few months has traveled thousands of miles and engaged with thousands of voters. Pennsylvania is home to 12.8 million residents and made up of 67 counties with vastly different needs and diverse populations. These meetings have shown the need for more visits over the next 43 days until election day, November 3rd. From Montgomery County, to Clarion, to Luzerne, to Indiana, to Allegheny, to Dauphin, to Philadelphia and the list goes on and on. Please see some photos from recent stops: _[**Nina in Moon Township with Leadership**](https://act.myngp.com/el/GqNDVYzw3K1jLs2F0INxGZN4qwtla_8YriWEiUfUMWE=/8IxQpoEhOkjB941FlpSToBv0VPwAXA_iwkvbMF2DvXU=)_ **[Nina in Indiana County with the County Chair Ann Rea](https://act.myngp.com/el/GqNDVYzw3K1jLs2F0INxGZN4qwtla_8YriWEiUfUMWE=/MCb7DOCUBm_WJfEtFjGpTFhBodca7qM_CDlElMmTk-k=)** **[and committee members](https://act.myngp.com/el/GqNDVYzw3K1jLs2F0INxGZN4qwtla_8YriWEiUfUMWE=/MCb7DOCUBm_WJfEtFjGpTFhBodca7qM_CDlElMmTk-k=)** **** _**[Nina meeting with voters in Squirrel Hill](https://act.myngp.com/el/GqNDVYzw3K1jLs2F0INxGZN4qwtla_8YriWEiUfUMWE=/gSK1xdiIh0zAS7fyGH8TnStEmypkhIbRLLUeNDU7unQ=) , Pittsburgh**_ **** **_[Nina in Clarion](https://act.myngp.com/el/GqNDVYzw3K1jLs2F0INxGZN4qwtla_8YriWEiUfUMWE=/GFqKBta7hElXjgCUz1nIxLn4O8p2o3O8-UJ-S59CBDU=) County_** **** These trips across our great commonwealth give Team Nina a greater sense of our mission - "Leave No One Behind"! Whether it is for gas money, lodging, or lawn signs - we need resources now, more than ever to Keep Team Nina on the Road to Victory and engaging voters. **[$5, $10 $20.20 or $100 will help us? subject: Ivanka Trump, Attorney General Barr Visiting Atlanta to Discuss Fight Against Human Trafficking
body:
Ivanka Trump, President Donald Trump’s oldest daughter and one of his top advisers, will pay a visit to Atlanta on Monday | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f41fabafbe&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Ivanka Trump, Attorney General Barr Visiting Atlanta to Discuss Fight Against Human Trafficking**

“Ivanka Trump, President Donald Trump’s oldest daughter and one of his top advisers, will pay a visit to Atlanta with U.S. Attorney General William Barr on Monday,” WSB-TV Atlanta reports.

Ms. Trump and Attorney General Barr will meet with Georgia officials and law enforcement officers to discuss the Trump Administration’s fight to end human trafficking. “The scourge of human trafficking is the modern-day equivalent of slavery, brutally depriving victims of basic human rights,” Attorney General Barr said.

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d8cb797cdd&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “On Friday, our nation lost a historic Supreme Court Justice: Ruth Bader Ginsburg. She was a brilliant justice, a legendary advocate, a careful lawyer, and, as only the second woman to ever serve on the Supreme Court, a trailblazer. She led an extraordinary life that shaped the lives of others,” Sen. Ted Cruz (R-FL) writes for [Fox News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d29e063773&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| President Trump “has broken a 39-year streak of American presidents either starting a war or bringing the United States into an international armed conflict,” a Norwegian official noted when nominating President Trump for the Nobel Prize. “If the Nobel committee fails to award the Peace Prize to Trump next month, the Peace Prize will end itself,” Gayle Trotter writes in [_The Hill_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3a84eed6a6&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “In response to this admission of racism by a university that receives millions of dollars in public support, the Department of Education has launched an investigation into Princeton’s apparently false certifications of nondiscrimination and equal opportunity protocols . . . The DoE has called Princeton’s bluff on the question of systemic racism, and not a moment too soon,” Seth Barron writes in _[City Journal](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=15043d669a&e=3ee4985eea)._
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=fb3a5fbe26&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=be1577acfc&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=2041dcf18e)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
