| Patriot,
Kat is working closely with President Trump to ensure Florida's success. Together, they are working on an America First Agenda!
Over the next four years, Kat wants to ensure lower taxes for the hardworking people of Florida, secure borders to keep our communities safe, and increased support for our brave law enforcement heroes.
She is honored to have you in her corner and has made it clear YOU are her priority. subject: This could make it or break it.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891f30/7f51f7bc/45f116b3/4efa7c2d/3098234992/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Peter --

The election is just over a month away, and we're in the home stretch. With **36% of voters** still unsure who they're voting for, we _need_ to get MJ's message out there. Senator Cornyn and his special interest allies are spending BIG to reach these voters, so we need your help right now to compete. | [DONATE TO SPREAD THE WORD](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891f30/7f51f7bc/45f116b3/4efa7c2c/3098234992/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIxNDIifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?refcode=email_20200921.2nd__2142__&amount=10")
---
Here's what sets MJ apart from Sen. Cornyn:
* MJ is a combat veteran who earned a Purple Heart while flying medevac missions in Afghanistan.
* She took on the Pentagon to open military jobs to women.
* She's a working mom who understands the challenges Texas families are dealing with on a daily basis, especially during the pandemic.
* **She 's not taking any corporate PAC money.**

We need your help to reach undecided voters who will swing this election on November 3rd. **Will you pitch in to help us spread MJ 's message to people who need to hear it?**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

name: Troy Nehls
subject: Save the Supreme Court!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nehls for Congress
body:
Tap or click to read more >>
Friend, I'm sure you've heard the news by now. There's an opening on the Supreme Court. President Trump is poised to appoint his THIRD Justice, but Nancy Pelosi and Chuck Schumer will stop at NOTHING to negate his appointments.

**In fact, they haven’t ruled out using impeachment to protect the vacancy and even discussed PACKING THE COURT if they win in November!**
Friend, it's vital we fight back. The future of the Legislative Branch and the Constitution are at stake. _**[Will you contribute $5 right now to save the Supreme Court?](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5154cae44487eae0041ad8cde91a9694/35193/e3c5e6106406e4ba/214e12c1b1e3b695c3d6b838967d376c/35193)**_ [Save the Supreme Court - Rush an Emergency Contribution!](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5154cae44487eae0041ad8cde91a9694/35193/e3c5e6106406e4ba/f992165ce1989fa4c3d6b838967d376c/35193) If Schumer and Pelosi are able to pack the court full of activist judges who don’t respect the Constitution, there's no telling which of our Constitutional rights will come under attack.
_**[Please, rush an emergency contribution right now to help save the Supreme Court from a activist judicial takeover](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5154cae44487eae0041ad8cde91a9694/35193/e3c5e6106406e4ba/430b46e2b0b0d184c3d6b838967d376c/35193)**_.

name: Dr. William Figlesthaler
subject: A friend in need
body:
Chris Cammarota needs our help today.
---
| | | | | | | |
---
| |
---
[ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001io_hQ2Rhnpjm61iRQ6G9W5sDfupT9K4SUsQ45D7i2-DCowJLjnaOef7MFZ9FOGYJTa-iouxcV-DH_ZWnc6QBMS-7msDrcIaB9TGOP4oKe7x2xb3AeBuMZlOCgC-iNJLcdKnJasX2-jyy1PzKDLHrzUQhd2WOO8OW&c=vRORDMXfrD3sd_MztoQtZfF5zGTAwPTUjDLUK6BAY2OOovX5pwlSeg==&ch=jVd72IirFBwM9SlAzRY9bunlq8Isny-2iRN2pLSfmN9YJTzwnVnpvA==)
---
| Peter,
This is Dr. William Figlesthaler, and while my race for Congress may have ended, my fight for Southwest Florida is far from over.
There are many positions up for grabs in the 2020 election, and it's essential that we elect true America First conservatives at every level of government.
My friend Chris Cammarota was an essential ally during my campaign, knocking on thousands of doors for both me and our great President.
Now, he's running against a lifelong liberal who's raising money from his Fake News Media friends and the do-nothing political establishment.
We can't afford to let him lose.
---
| |
---
| |
---
| Like me, Chris is a conservative outsider. He's served in our Armed Forces and has been volunteering for the Republican Party for years.
That's why I'm so proud to officially endorse Chris Cammarota.
---
| |
---
| |
---

body:
**LISA SCHELLER ENDORSED BY THE FRATERNAL ORDER OF POLICE, STROUD LODGE # 75** **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE**
Brooke Race
Info@schellerforcongress.com

**Allentown, Pa.** – Today, the Scheller Campaign is honored to receive its second unanimous endorsement from the Fraternal Order of Police. 130 members of Stroud Lodge 75 FOP are committed to supporting Lisa in this upcoming election. The FOP is a fraternal organization consisting of sworn law enforcement officers in the United States. This endorsement is a testament to the fact that Lisa has shown that she will truly stand up and support our law enforcement. While Lisa’s opponent, Susan Wild, wants to risk our safety and the security of Pennsylvania families by [defunding and dismantling the police.](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=04c88d477df4455b953e5c4d1321bb8d&_e=teEkKk3ZI4YyJSyaYfSYQ7PX7wjFTKLYaqAV5tiIl0a_abxTL8YuG45mH8Wj3fku1Mhh1f9xqUmN4EY5q3UL7RnMPRRR5SREvHWs3yLtjuB5_MHpVp9UTLvVU8BFJcTlmRUhAzegqNz7hX6WJET5UjZijFmuzobp-bSNLy1LUxgul2JqK0y8t9AYI6tP1UfRO1f-gOEWBhvWAHdajRwXk11-GIZfRt8Y7iUQ18Hfr-o158SEsf5Rvf5fkm8t76Wxr1c206ux-mvBnCu6dFwP4DbgTQSSCJx5J9ZcmdDGM2fQJWWbJ6qpHF6fQshxU3Cgfr1zTKKKa2BDsle3zUHhR8Rf5pFgkOurBMKcoiO6O5ajvNMYKYFumVQpycOGuUQE3pLR0v_yjFsV22UNNRqGio2CWdSQMHHZzRArJ4ruqhyG5jmSvKqs4Jwv3FbUWM11p_XNVEa-Tzwt_YctYuRm2DCdDh1dU1IfrvoXD6mSl3A1iiT7n7350JLh-g24VwyV0BuYhj-iRuO9VJSLjWlh9lcKBkOtvdDVa_A7sI-F_g3M3gleSdWl1jrOlezzMhdwtO9XCwpErwb92TvtzgmBiILcBx2BhgeZyRT3YRlZkYDbstEJoOh-sPgivpkHbUuplLh1oTj7LWMtA6ASu6zgenWipXrUUwVRWPZ-FE6soYu1PGI9oIKyOJ3ozbtggV6lbqN30cVDg33M6gQLGl6-6R5MLDHxWgq4UWC0E1614paBCAfitcMqq7KaFsNQFP3_hWA8abD4hWbPA0p8fvaJeCggq-UCkBETFqcg4cWR2lN4qVSEohOmY89Ku-H3pM1rYVkr8LmjTwuJTMA4ExTn8ddg87noLiFpO4Aa63xVz395faVaKNhgWCZnLWkjn5SSxHw3E3AjoSYOK7KqmFXecunHNJegwk2qLrvXYvEnZeoItP-oErORwADbr50hh-ml_J9iTHdACr2oD9B9gFo5CLXfkCGTP4vTC9UzlJgIWMMZBEUqQm3gvXmi9_372pBL2xRlGeWJDVPnI_H3p_PBEg2SuqivlgAo4hETjuhZ3tl3KA9I3QIrh8hwElD2k05yZRJHwceYjKYnA7xEqjuYBeT9Xc4U_KEI4O8WS49XWA88d0JQu0ZlGcWmI_8OufT2_sbwGMiiQYe1Q67XYWQnAcmL69iB8IpL7EbbtGDraJqL0OkGiQ_0V7f0cBtJczJl74jCwwMWW7G-_xwb6Q3FTl2ZQuGJj_j_uxNO2MycDwu1hIGpbZi5WLm41ia0Lt0MJI8gm5J8Ebt-YbY6iYWBpAdFBRvLVweNWLSpoguCgv-GAxc1WNhRL_V5PnxRwm95qP5LdNVLMHCfq04g8DQNnjPStT-G-fdGU_ZwPI1A3EofsNgH_5M2FieX9W6x4nJL4Xw-twSGB0mybtnkgBxOUvXPD64IRjBe6qddQSfguXhc2rP9y4RKaBZ5dA7i_bUbAZEKnR8wRb_Yo2E41apamwey5nfYhfylPnnrhwdTlYw%3D)

Lisa released the following statement after the endorsement:

“I am honored to receive this endorsement from FOP Lodge 75. The law enforcement community has my complete support. I promise to stand up for those who continue to excel in making the Lehigh Valley a safe place to live for us and our families. We cannot allow the streets to be filled with chaos and lawlessness. The police are the first responders to a broad range of public-safety issues and serious crime and I strongly stand with you. Thank you to the FOP for putting your faith in me to defend PA07 as you continue to risk your lives to guard and protect all of us, I will not let you down once I’m in Congress like our current representative has.” Paid for by Lisa Scheller for Congress, Inc. name: Cory Booker
subject: When you love your home, it shows
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
This is what Jay and I have in common.
| [](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8912?t=3&akid=8155%2E868730%2EvIPTmU) Friend, I know what it's like to root hard for the place you call home. When I took on the entrenched political machine in my first campaign for Newark mayor in 2002, I lost. But when you love a place so much, you stop at nothing to help it succeed. And when I ran again in 2006, we won -- now, more folks are moving to Newark to start a business, a life, and a family. It's a testament to what we built and our commitment to never give up on home. And that's why I root for my friend Jay. Jay's never given up on home either. He was so true to his principles that when he voted on an assault weapons ban during his time in Congress, he lost his seat. But he didn't give up: He kept working as a public servant and eventually championed and signed major gun safety legislation in Washington state as governor. When you love where you're from, it shows. I love New Jersey as much as he loves Washington state, and we're both fighting for better for the people we represent, from the capitol in Olympia to the halls of the United States Senate. It takes heart, and it takes courage -- Jay has both. **[That's why I'm hoping you'll join me in support of his reelection campaign today. We need hometown heroes like Jay to keep fighting for the people and the state they love: Donate $5 or more right now.](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/11542?t=4&akid=8155%2E868730%2EvIPTmU)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$5 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/11543?t=5&akid=8155%2E868730%2EvIPTmU)

subject: Tell Mitch McConnell the Senate MUST wait to vote >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand with Sánchez |
body:
Join the thousands of Americans who are demanding the Senate WAIT until a new President is sworn in before appointing a Supreme Court Justice | ADD YOUR NAME >>

In the wake of Justice Ruth Bader Ginsburg's passing, President Trump and Mitch McConnell are already scheming to fill her vacant seat before the American people have the chance to make their voices heard on November 3rd.

With just 43 days until Election Day, it would be beyond hypocritical for Senate Republicans to vote on a Supreme Court nominee between now and then. Let us not forget that in 2016, when Justice Antonin Scalia passed away 269 days before the Presidential election, Senate Majority Leader Mitch McConnell refused to hold a vote on President Barack Obama's nominee.

Now, Senate Republicans have an obligation to wait until after the 2020 Presidential election is decided. Fair is fair.

Will you SIGN YOUR NAME to demand the Senate hold off on confirming the next Supreme Court Justice until after the American people have voted?

Thanks for taking action,

-- Team Sánchez

----------------------------------------
| Paid for by Stand with Sánchez |
----------------------------------------

Stand with Sánchez
415 New Jersey Avenue, SE - Unit 1
Washington DC 20003 United States

body:
He’s definitely NOT the kind of person we want representing New Hampshire. | |
---
Friend,

I wanted to make sure you saw Matt’s email from earlier today.

**One thing’s for certain with Chris using these kinds of political stunts – Chris Pappas is NOT the kind of person we want representing the Granite State.**

\--------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Matt Mowers
Date: Monday, September 21, 2020 at 10:59 AM
To: John
Subject: Chris Pappas’ disgusting political stunt
|
---
John –

This weekend, I lost all respect for Chris Pappas.

Just hours after Justice Ruth Bader Ginsburg passed away, Chris Pappas sent a campaign email..._from Justice Ginsburg._
|
---
|
---
Even though I didn’t always see eye to eye with Justice Ginsburg, I had nothing but respect for her. She fought tirelessly for what she believed in and dedicated her life to the pursuit of justice. She was an incredible woman and an inspiration to us all.

...which is exactly why this stunt from Chris Pappas shakes me to my core.

**Using the death of an American icon for your own political gain isn’t just disrespectful - it’s disgusting.**

I hope that Chris Pappas feels deep remorse for his poor judgement and thoughtless actions. Justice Ginsburg’s legacy and the people of New Hampshire deserve better.

\- Matt
---

name: Laura Loomer
subject: "Lunatic"
body:
“I don’t mean to be disrespectful when I tell you she’s a lunatic.”
| | | [](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-393923-928103-5201640-5e785c22b8-8139685841)
Patriot,

[](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-393923-928103-5201640-5e785c22b8-8139685841) **“I don’t mean to be disrespectful when I tell you she’s a lunatic.”**

That was what my radical Democrat opponent Lois Frankel said about me last week during a virtual town hall.

And in typical Democrat fashion, she doesn’t mention any specifics as to why I’m a “lunatic” other than me being banned on social media for being a conservative.

Sorry, Lois, that’s called social media bias, not lunacy.

What I consider lunacy is co-sponsoring a bill to give free healthcare to illegal immigrants.

I consider it completely out of touch that the only legislation Lois Frankel has ever sponsored and passed during her time in Congress was a resolution to condemn female genital mutilation.

And I consider it lunacy to back and THANK rioters the morning after they lit fires and destroyed small businesses in our district while stopping Floridians from getting to work.

[**Help me defeat Lois Frankel by donating today.**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-393923-928103-5201640-5e785c22b8-8139685841)

While Frankel is too arrogant to say my name, she will now say this:

“It’s going to be a competitive race. Whoever turns out their voters will win.”

[**That is correct, so help me turn out voters in Florida 21 by donating today.**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-393923-928103-5201640-5e785c22b8-8139685841)

With 43 days until Election Day, we need to fund our media campaign, our door knocking program and voter outreach.

We’re also days away from closing out the September fundraising report – **the most important of the campaign!**

If you haven’t done so recently, [**please donate whatever you can today to help us reach our fundraising goal by the 30th!**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-393923-928103-5201640-5e785c22b8-8139685841)

Thank you again for all that you do.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

name: Rob Portman
subject: Do YOU find America GREAT?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rob Portman for Senate [Unsubscribe](http://links
body:
I have a simple question for you: Are you proud of America? For the last several weeks, we have been hearing rumblings that people of this.......... Peter I have a simple question for you:
**[Are you proud of America?](http://links.robportman.com/u/click?_t=15c7a5d863b14bd0a136c4fe6499ad25&_m=c21db4e3fd7b434b8efe818dd23d1bb4&_e=VMLurd94pZJskzfI7zypNRl7cDOF6lk3Oioib7z7TamYACO7jOK-zYANAWsXmLpd95_7oQN7CASsg6kAFNYoT5XX9uoY-UDxTEjYMLpNsbIXWoCbbSn9Hw6U3Sb-1S27OnH-srvShKnusGm5ddN4HVYsMDiTAj9U6GkLvKkGb3oKpH5qkB2taL4NP3r8K2GNP8QBouf7Ms5gq6nvlquISkXKha8MtmvU9XNR1Z48eF7GJEdW_-lc3k0yQv1GtIuwDKyOa3VyCQQI3Gm_o4bOFR1eeOdQaZKfDwXIRtb-JUVqMHcGk4zYMroC5EFxSWcUjctPOuIwjh-3LBUf-PkwkpELLXXW-9WY0hpVypooNrrbYJ1sNlxy8pGDIaEUYJYAZSRcX9DETl50rAxxyQmnqVnKGUIXPYaTfT2bEPS8pI6DOyT4Ia8TlfWDjbM1Tbr8)**
For the last several weeks, we have been hearing rumblings that people of this country are no longer ‘proud’ of America or proud to live here, but Peter, I need you to hear it from me first: I am PROUD not only of our nation, but PROUD to be an American.
We are the land of the free and the home of the brave. We are the land of limited government. We are the land of innovation and opportunity. And we are the land where we are celebrated for our differences. Peter, I want to hear from you though. Are you proud of America? You can let me know by taking a quick, 15 second survey! [**YES I THINK AMERICA IS GREAT**](http://links.robportman.com/u/click?_t=15c7a5d863b14bd0a136c4fe6499ad25&_m=c21db4e3fd7b434b8efe818dd23d1bb4&_e=VMLurd94pZJskzfI7zypNRl7cDOF6lk3Oioib7z7TamYACO7jOK-zYANAWsXmLpd95_7oQN7CASsg6kAFNYoT5XX9uoY-UDxTEjYMLpNsbIXWoCbbSn9Hw6U3Sb-1S27OnH-srvShKnusGm5ddN4HVYsMDiTAj9U6GkLvKkGb3oKpH5qkB2taL4NP3r8K2GNP8QBouf7Ms5gq6nvlquIShveT-Xx9C8kboxGSloXF8RQCu1lyVwVEAtBqwFSuznPi1TKkP95nKkiT7_Ve6ZEU9URgHTeH9HjnD8qebAGw8yZ5Yu5lV6xxaWUw1hUfuizkMxOfLShq2T8P6x2k42KJt9BU2Mz2lhzDk2oGo5YO5ohXkCt7HQPjwls81-ah4gfgGdKz5i7KwHSD4b7t6VD9fdPhX1PhiNdV1S5JAlyv2Ax6GqHeT0RsnQ30J9rSECB) [**I AM PROUD TO LIVE IN AMERICA**](http://links.robportman.com/u/click?_t=15c7a5d863b14bd0a136c4fe6499ad25&_m=c21db4e3fd7b434b8efe818dd23d1bb4&_e=VMLurd94pZJskzfI7zypNRl7cDOF6lk3Oioib7z7TamYACO7jOK-zYANAWsXmLpd95_7oQN7CASsg6kAFNYoT5XX9uoY-UDxTEjYMLpNsbIXWoCbbSn9Hw6U3Sb-1S27OnH-srvShKnusGm5ddN4HVYsMDiTAj9U6GkLvKkGb3oKpH5qkB2taL4NP3r8K2GNP8QBouf7Ms5gq6nvlquISkA9bBXv9SvuYvf4gSBi9uoUnkbzUKg0rQaBKafXB9TK1xN0U8JYk5zBtqOPzwqr-fQvmKmaNHEWCjnAsho38q22ASWdOMpXw4Ygme0Egq7qygHCKJ_56pZ9eDQ406oNr4IUeLnbJh98Yss1lVb7n8tSIhKBxRu8tZrZN-6pl0peWC_DLVQjLU65NGy_ZI4GY6jVFuzuN0G2zsqiHPgaImdUIJxIbig1U0OGu2UzTuGy) The Far-Left radicals keep trying to tell that America is on the ropes, but what I don’t think they know is that we are PROUD of this land of opportunity, prosperity, and liberty! **[Do you agree?](http://links.robportman.com/u/click?_t=15c7a5d863b14bd0a136c4fe6499ad25&_m=c21db4e3fd7b434b8efe818dd23d1bb4&_e=VMLurd94pZJskzfI7zypNRl7cDOF6lk3Oioib7z7TamYACO7jOK-zYANAWsXmLpd95_7oQN7CASsg6kAFNYoT5XX9uoY-UDxTEjYMLpNsbIXWoCbbSn9Hw6U3Sb-1S27OnH-srvShKnusGm5ddN4HVYsMDiTAj9U6GkLvKkGb3oKpH5qkB2taL4NP3r8K2GNP8QBouf7Ms5gq6nvlquISvTR1u4GQ_vgol4_aJIQM3NuMqhCHsvK69lFanNtZhuSJzmVLnPmOp7_manNvCrWeafq4AutuwATCnP4p38Za_TwAkK1qhHGh3_mikdEGK-JI8B4_FypBKxN89XOOOSMLs84FswQ4FSFgss9fIs8b_zIp9zFpiMxAjS5e5PlycGElZH6FMm6gDaPKSWOw--3jpTtByYD_qzr0l3SFXEiHbZrZ4qO7iisxWPzpynWqyTH)** Again, this survey won’t take long, but I would really appreciate to know where you stand! Thanks in advance, Peter. Rob Portman

name: SERIOUS [via Jon Ossoff HQ]
subject: Mitch McConnell's "October surprise"
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JON OSSOFF FOR SENATE
body:
We can't let him win, friend |
---
Friend,

Mitch McConnell didn't waste any time.

Just _HOURS_ after the passing of Justice Ruth Bader Ginsburg, McConnell proclaimed that Donald Trump's Supreme Court nominee would receive a vote on the floor of the U.S. Senate.

**McConnell has been eagerly awaiting this moment; months ago, he reportedly said Justice Ginsburg dying before the Election would be his "October surprise."**

**_It's sick, friend._**

Of course, McConnell is not following his own rules. He set a precedent in 2016 when he refused to hold confirmation hearings for President Obama's Supreme Court nominee during an Election Year.

Jon Ossoff's opponent, Senator David Perdue, joined McConnell in that craven effort in 2016. _"It is critical that the American people have a say in selecting a new Supreme Court Justice," Perdue said at the time._

**But now, Perdue is going against _his own principles_ and supporting a Senate vote on Trump's nominee. _Even though this year's Election is already underway in some states, and November 3 is only weeks away._**

We simply cannot allow Mitch McConnell and David Perdue to jam through a Supreme Court confirmation in the days before the Presidential Election. **We need to make sure we do all we can to remove McConnell and Perdue from power.**

**[Friend, today, can you make a donation to Jon's surging campaign to help send Perdue into retirement and strip McConnell of his Senate majority?](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2f41/5b2c1286/3a2c756e/25f3e7ab/2954659043/VEsH/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_21_mitch_oct?refcode=em_2020_09_21_mitch_oct")**

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: Come have a beer with me Tuesday night
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Powered by People, [poweredxpeople
body:
With 43 days to go, I’d like to bring everyone together to talk about what we’re doing to make sure we win the most important election of our lives. Will you join me for a beer?
[**Come have a beer with me Tuesday night.**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/43073?t=1&akid=106036%2E444211%2EJSKGl_)
I’d love to celebrate our hard work with you. And, with 43 days still to go, it would be good to bring everyone together to talk about what we’re doing to make sure we win the most important elections of our lives.
[](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/43073?t=2&akid=106036%2E444211%2EJSKGl_)
Powered by People is all about registering and turning out voters to win critical elections, like these important Texas House races all over the state. But we’re also about building a community of dedicated volunteers who have found purpose and function in the tough work necessary to save our democracy.
Sometimes a beer, or two, helps to bring us closer together. At least that’s how I justify it.
**To RSVP for Tuesday’s Beers with Beto event and to join the conversation with dozens of other volunteers and supporters, please click the link below.** I ask that you make a small contribution to help fund the voter registration and voter contact work that Powered by People is making. Otherwise, just make sure to show up with your favorite beer at the link we’ll send you after you RSVP.
[Beers with Beto Virtual Fundraiser](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/43073?t=3&akid=106036%2E444211%2EJSKGl_)[
Tuesday, September 22, 7:30 pm CT](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/43073?t=4&akid=106036%2E444211%2EJSKGl_) **[RSVP »](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/43073?t=5&akid=106036%2E444211%2EJSKGl_)**
---
This should be fun!
I look forward to seeing you soon,
Beto
PS - back when it was possible, we’d often celebrate a hard day’s block walk with some beers and fellowship. Here is a look back to spending time with our Powered by People team in Fort Bend:

clean_body: With 43 days to go, I’d like to bring everyone together to talk about what we’re doing to make sure we win the most important election of our lives. Will you join me for a beer? I’d love to celebrate our hard work with you. And, with 43 days still to go, it would be good to bring everyone together to talk about what we’re doing to make sure we win the most important elections of our lives. Powered by People is all about registering and turning out voters to win critical elections, like these important Texas House races all over the state. But we’re also about building a community of dedicated volunteers who have found purpose and function in the tough work necessary to save our democracy. Sometimes a beer, or two, helps to bring us closer together. At least that’s how I justify it. To RSVP for Tuesday’s Beers with Beto event and to join the conversation with dozens of other volunteers and supporters, please click the link below. I ask that you make a small contribution to help fund the voter registration and voter contact work that Powered by People is making. Otherwise, just make sure to show up with your favorite beer at the link we’ll send you after you RSVP. This should be fun! I look forward to seeing you soon, Beto PS - back when it was possible, we’d often celebrate a hard day’s block walk with some beers and fellowship. Here is a look back to spending time with our Powered by People team in Fort Bend: Paid for by Powered by People, , not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

name: Wesley Hunt for Congress
subject: Fletcher Votes to Overturn Texas Right to Work Law
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
**Lizzie Fletcher Votes to Overturn Texas Right to Work Law, Force Workers to Unionize**

Houston, TX - Today, Representative Fletcher's viability as a protector of Houston workers and steward of economic growth took another hit as it was revealed that she voted to overturn the Texas Right to Work Law this February. Fletcher's vote would undermine 28 states that have implemented right to work laws, delivering a blow to the First Amendment rights of workers nationwide and threatening the comparatively high employment rates seen in right to work states.

Under the Texas Right to Work Law, an individual cannot be denied employment due to membership or non-membership in a labor organization; in other words, the choice to unionize is yours and your choice is legally protected. However, Representative Fletcher and Congressional Democrats are angling to:
* Strip Americans of their freedom to work independently and compel them to pay union dues with no control over how their hard-earned dollars are spent;
* Abolish workers' protections against political intimidation;
* And, force businesses to disclose workers' personal information to labor organizations without the workers' consent.

[](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=f70029379ac043628223318f9b6b6810&_e=HZdY6A-KcCfhch9aJcmPDxtm_IU6Z-16sdzc8RFmzW361hSiemAcewhnxjF1xJS-fi3pTl8q_SI3SP7H8Jim65kZKygbehtMSAxqLP4m95qxoCwHL6-1i-8WG9ChhYWl7eGHiaUIS5ca75OIB00iuVYr0kGjrFiwVNjK9YWw1xgneNydNlJms4v263x4n02SoZaxX16J1nXNiVHgfKIVJMtEq5ZdaEFsZpcYxYvYTFDXNJMBFCWaHJXDSKgnAv-GxNfHVqG98SleKElriogXYDUJY5HUF6gBp4YCnWfNVInPlBU5rWv9hGFQgqbliSMU)

Mandating union membership in Texas, in addition to signifying an abuse of federal authority and an attack on individuals' Constitutional rights, would be incredibly disruptive to Texas' workforce, where less than 4% of employed individuals choose to join unions. The evidence shows that not only do Texans prefer not to unionize, but states where workers are denied the freedom to work independently are more likely to have higher unemployment.

What's more, Fletcher's vote is tarnished by incriminating self-interest; research shows that a vast majority of unions use their dues to support left-wing political platforms without first receiving consent from their members. Fletcher has once again elevated the priorities of left-wing ideologues determined to re-write our economy from the top down ahead of the needs of her voters.

_"Fletcher's vote to overturn the Texas Right to Work Law is a blatant violation of workers' First Amendment rights and a gross example of federal coercion,"_ **said Communications Director Jackie Modesett.** _"Rather than supporting the needs of Texas workers, less than 4% of whom elect to join unions, Fletcher is enabling the extreme elements of her party who want to dramatically increase the role of the federal government in our economy and reduce worker independence in the process. In effect, Fletcher has voted to force workers to give their hard-earned dollars to groups who give the vast majority of their funds to left-wing politicians without receiving consent from the workers they claim to represent. This is kind of behavior is disqualifying for a self-proclaimed moderate and a red flag to 7th District voters who seek to keep corruption and coercion out of the workplace. We need a leader who can help the 7th District bounce back from the coronavirus, not cave to the anti-business forces within her party." _

###
****[CONTRIBUTE](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=f70029379ac043628223318f9b6b6810&_e=HZdY6A-KcCfhch9aJcmPD2dgcPtvEEGC_lEvoAlyYILCOn2CeZ2TFGbSHJ3O1A_h76rARJXKnx8IAkpZZthgSj6xe9idMFL0Djhcr0spNh6mnOgz7yPzwBbGkgOZjOkVaLEynfz708lgaDxO6iarNIdHyrFAMD3TS6QF7xXixMunEsJdewL5s_nu40Jt6bhYvXPAhN1v1nWbf7XJ4aG4eCv6v2xGJCcvMwnT0eGUADGDcZqXd047T1n9cuxVgMHhZvWCbfGUI6TbSMgQ3nV6X4jFv2yU1JkrfX0GFhPVxow%3D)****
---

subject: In a moment, we're going to ask if you can make your first contribution to Warren Democrats
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren Democrats
body:
We can't leave anything up to chance. That's why this team is fighting each and every day to help organize in races across the country, fundraise for down-ballot Democrats, and volunteer for campaigns | | | [](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285251a0/45c30650/1c01ca50b/66e8fded/963131554/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
In a moment, we're going to ask if you can make your first contribution to Warren Democrats. But first, we wanted to explain why your contribution would be so important right now.

There are only 43 days until Election Day, and people across the country are already casting their ballots. Everything is on the line: Taking back control of the White House, regaining a majority in the Senate, and protecting the future of our Supreme Court.

We can't leave anything up to chance. That's why this team is fighting each and every day to help organize in races across the country, fundraise for down-ballot Democrats, and volunteer for campaigns that can use an extra push.

**We're so grateful to have you on this team. We have big plans for the final weeks of this election, but we can only carry out those plans with the support of our strongest grassroots supporters like you.**

**[If you can, please chip in $2 or whatever you can to power our work in the final stretch of the election, help take back the Senate, and elect Democrats up and down the ballot this November.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285251a0/45c30650/1c01ca50b/66e8fdec/963131554/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6IndkLXNlcHQyMC13ZWVrbHkiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNVjE3Rl9FR1JfR1JNX1RfMjAyMDA5MjFfVjFTMV9QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/wd-sept20-weekly?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMV17F_EGR_GRM_T_20200921_V1S1_P")**

name: Susie Lee
subject: Tell the Trump Administration NOT to end the Census count early! >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Susie Lee for Congress
body:
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19396796/252958771/606166776?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNWMwZTkwMS02ZmZjLWVhMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=110Uh7VcYtVp-0W3ghisNCAYKdfgbrdX0pKyf3ek_rA=&emci=cd9eb43a-66fc-ea11-96f5-00155d03affc&emdi=25c0e901-6ffc-ea11-96f5-00155d03affc&ceid=10997957) The 2020 Census has faced enormous hurdles. The initial headcount was sorely disrupted by Donald Trump’s failed attempt to include a citizenship question on the form. Then, the Census Bureau faced the nearly impossible task of organizing communities to complete the census during a global pandemic and economic crisis. **Now, Donald Trump and his Administration have decided to end its count one month early.** This move is undemocratic and will have devastating effects on communities across the country, especially in Nevada. [**We’re collecting 100,000 signatures on a nationwide petition to tell the Trump Administration that he CANNOT cut the Census count short. Will you add your name?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19396798/252958775/606166776?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNWMwZTkwMS02ZmZjLWVhMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=110Uh7VcYtVp-0W3ghisNCAYKdfgbrdX0pKyf3ek_rA=&emci=cd9eb43a-66fc-ea11-96f5-00155d03affc&emdi=25c0e901-6ffc-ea11-96f5-00155d03affc&ceid=10997957) | | | [Sign the Petition →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19396799/252958781/606166776?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNWMwZTkwMS02ZmZjLWVhMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=110Uh7VcYtVp-0W3ghisNCAYKdfgbrdX0pKyf3ek_rA=&emci=cd9eb43a-66fc-ea11-96f5-00155d03affc&emdi=25c0e901-6ffc-ea11-96f5-00155d03affc&ceid=10997957)
---
Trump’s decision to end the count early has left the agency only weeks to contact hard-to-reach rural communities, as well as communities of color who have been disproportionately underrepresented in previous counts.
For every person who is not counted in Nevada, we lose an estimated $20,000 to support critical services like Medicaid, Medicare and education.
In addition, an undercount in the Census has lasting consequences -- the Census count informs funding decisions for the next decade, and it’s a critical indicator for whether communities will grow or improve quality of life.
Millions of people will miss their opportunity to be counted if Trump ends the Census count early, and we can’t let this happen without speaking up. [**I’m asking you to join us in telling Trump that our communities deserve a fair count. Will you click below and add your name to the petition? →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19396800/252958782/606166776?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNWMwZTkwMS02ZmZjLWVhMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=110Uh7VcYtVp-0W3ghisNCAYKdfgbrdX0pKyf3ek_rA=&emci=cd9eb43a-66fc-ea11-96f5-00155d03affc&emdi=25c0e901-6ffc-ea11-96f5-00155d03affc&ceid=10997957)

name: Gina Raimondo
subject: First-of-its-kind
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hello friend,
Last week was a big week for Rhode Island. After months of hard work, schools across the state opened their doors to students, teachers and staff. It was an all-hands-on-deck effort, and I'm grateful to everyone involved. And because of the systems we've put in place for testing, contact tracing and more, I'm confident we will be able to stay ahead of the virus and contain cases in schools while limiting the disruption in learning.
One of those systems is the first-of-its-kind Education Operations Center, or "EdOC." This command center is a coordinated effort across state agencies, including the Department of Education, Department of Health, and Emergency Management Agency, relying on the operational expertise of the Rhode Island National Guard. The EdOC is the nerve center of our school reopening effort. Every day, the EdOC is providing real-time support to our schools with the highest degree of professionalism and operational proficiency.
---
|
---
| I had the opportunity to visit the EdOC for myself last Friday to learn about how they operate and what steps they're taking to keep school communities safe. What I saw was an operation with an unparalleled ability to rapidly respond to the threat of COVID-19 by visiting schools, providing technical assistance, and disseminating key public health information. Already, the EdOC has received nearly 200 calls seeking information, clarification on guidance for schools, questions about probable cases and more. And we've deployed more than a dozen assistance teams to help with everything from containing positive cases, to reviewing mitigation measures, to operational check-ins with school leaders. These teams have also set up virtual health and safety trainings for teachers, nurses and other school staff.
This school year will be unlike any other, and I'm so grateful that we have the expertise of the Rhode Island National Guard to help get us through these unprecedented times. Our work is only just beginning; there will surely be new challenges to overcome in the weeks and months ahead. I am confident, however, that our team at the EdOC will continue to be a critical ingredient in making this school year a success.
We're all in this together,
-Gina Raimondo Governor
P.S.: Information is our greatest weapon in the fight against COVID-19. subject: Read President Trump’s proclamation on the death of Ruth Bader Ginsburg
body:
Ruth Bader Ginsburg, who became the second woman to serve on the U.S. Supreme Court upon her confirmation in 1993, passed away Friday... | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0be82f524c&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • September 21, 2020
---
| | |
# **Read President Trump’s proclamation on the death of Ruth Bader Ginsburg**

**Ruth Bader Ginsburg,** who became the second woman to serve on the U.S. Supreme Court upon her confirmation in 1993, passed away Friday at the age of 87.

**“She led an amazing life,”** President Trump said after hearing the news.

**President Trump issued** a proclamation on Justice Ginsburg’s death over the weekend, reading in part:
| | _A fighter to the end, Justice Ginsburg defeated cancer and the odds numerous times—all while continuing to serve on the Court. Her commitment to the law and her fearlessness in the face of death inspired countless “RBG” fans, and she continues to serve as a role model to countless women lawyers. Her legacy and contribution to American history will never be forgotten._ |
---|---|---

📖 [**Read President Trump’s full proclamation on Justice Ginsburg.**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=61560a0909&e=3ee4985eea)

📖 [**Vice President Pence’s statement: ‘A true public servant’**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=093aecc2a0&e=3ee4985eea)

|
---
|
## **Ivanka Trump and AG Barr announce over $100 million to fight human trafficking**

**Last month,** the U.S. Marshals Service led a two-week operation alongside Georgia state and local officers to rescue endangered missing children in Atlanta and Macon.

**“Operation Not Forgotten”** resulted in the rescue of 26 children, the safe locating of 13 other children, and the arrest of nine criminal associates. Investigators cleared 26 arrest warrants and filed additional charges for crimes related to sex trafficking, kidnapping, registered sex offender violations, and drugs and weapons possession.

**Today, Ivanka Trump** and Attorney General William Barr are visiting Atlanta to highlight the Trump Administration’s work to protect human trafficking survivors, prosecute human traffickers, and put an end to this evil industry once and for all.

**Ms. Trump joined** Attorney General Barr for a tour of the survivor care facility at the Georgia Center for Child Advocacy. The Center’s “Envision Project” delivers intensive case management and educational support, along with employment readiness and personal development programming for the victims of trafficking.

**“The Trump Administration** continues to fight tirelessly to end the scourge of human trafficking in our communities,” Ms. Trump said. “The leaders and community members we’re meeting with in Atlanta are on the front lines of this fight and are critical to our efforts to end this horrific crime.”

**The Attorney General** and Ms. Trump also stopped at the U.S. Attorney’s office in Atlanta to join a roundtable with law enforcement officers, service providers, and private-sector partners. During the discussion, Ms. Trump and Attorney General Barr announced additional [**funding of nearly $101 million**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a04cda97e8&e=3ee4985eea) from the Justice Department to hold human traffickers accountable and provide vital services to trafficking victims.

**“The Department of Justice** is relentless in its fight against the perpetrators of these heinous crimes,” Attorney General Barr said.

**“Working with state** **and local** law enforcement and community victim service providers, we will continue to bring these criminals to justice.”

[**THANK YOU to the U.S. Marshals and our law enforcement officers!**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=884e59c337&e=3ee4985eea)
---

**Team Scheller Victory Grassroots Update**
**September 21st** **Last Weeks Update:** The Scheller campaign was excited to welcome 20 new volunteers to the team! These hard-working volunteers knocked on over 5,000 doors and made over 6,000 phone calls this week. Keep up the good work Team Scheller! Join the team by signing up [HERE](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=9558fecd424d47759e2232e587f68c81&_e=KsxVjpX0X-oS0fkZ0jY_mdPE9ApJaD8nNaOhQtAVrftiAxkm9XiRRFNuaYeTMVshGPjFQFDHfROdaAJT1GfS6A6P937rbO61-PXGh25Ye84En5PBdTA0S0WB4k_OI46m5ncGHhXy1cMXFmf4NpOd0UmkmzdQdRK0Expm8dnvDuwNaI2rRif-SDI0twCKNrPXAJ8rzEHdbh0xShlOkqyi4yoS8mq1AMvCwT48aManSOUj01cJZ-B09QSPuRtrRuMtDzYJdrfYRGEljYxw29dr3XbYWqJjFoQjfHEl5f08jZ4%3D) This week we had two phone banks and a very successful door knocking weekend. Our volunteers are determined to get Lisa in office, the tide is turning in the 7th District! Last week the Lisa Scheller campaign hosted an event at Lehigh Valley Sporting Clays in support of the Second Amendment and President Trump. As over 200 people waited in line show their support for the Scheller campaign, Lisa gave a speech that fired up the crowd and earned her a standing ovation. The crowded roared as she promised to protect and defend the American Dream and Second Amendment rights for the Pennsylvania 7th Congressional District. Our voting and volunteer base continues to grow stronger and stronger everyday! When Lisa was not knocking on doors or going to meet and greets this week, she was spending her time at the Syrian Food Bank in Allentown. No one cares more about the people in the Lehigh Valley than Lisa Scheller. **This Week Moving Forward:** **Sign up here now** [Phone bank 5:30pm Monday:](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=9558fecd424d47759e2232e587f68c81&_e=KsxVjpX0X-oS0fkZ0jY_mREEeXUHg9ZSqVuITh2naS0qCek4yk6lqaRSUx50SwUy1AeBxBToFEDEMJshOdGqhP2kY4ilUQ6Uv2olkWZ_4mhu1PgLVhSAr0KKpyavzrLdATGLuQ3d41_EHZaM-JcIh706TJwPHK09Ce92Eg1oLSic9O6XUf1xjjxWuCbmqAyucHkMIajnHB5ZQKAzzQ_q9pLfRCQLvMh0kY_IO8SN0D_-qUqyYcgTGbDicmv7yd8t9Qk3OfgY_P97ILyeEJjnvtjcKjN1GMcigIot_sDCUV-_qGNElc482Xi7-KvNkEuY) [Door knocking 12pm Wednesday:](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=9558fecd424d47759e2232e587f68c81&_e=KsxVjpX0X-oS0fkZ0jY_mREEeXUHg9ZSqVuITh2naS0qCek4yk6lqaRSUx50SwUy1AeBxBToFEDEMJshOdGqhP2kY4ilUQ6Uv2olkWZ_4mjnVY77oCAeY-ch62qcyeQSp17oR6XAgTH6Vb1HLP0rMSc_dfK7oG4KKK86wGMblwgIAV1ZyOyhXnADBS6qc9XVDnXbRyLnzMsZGTKrmDykHN9Tcp01IeQkKFpG9aO2qBiKAmwuyvKgsuUVDnM5y77IJna0WaGnTnbre2kW8BavOXCMLUp3ULqTfP4QTdsvJ16MNBLc_MohLAuSpHYIdPo6)

[Meet and Greet Xtreme Gun Worx 2:30 pm Saturday:](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=9558fecd424d47759e2232e587f68c81&_e=KsxVjpX0X-oS0fkZ0jY_mREEeXUHg9ZSqVuITh2naS0ovKhIR4BUGizaI_JVTdauPR_wejk99tcqUBhiwgn4Wx1Fq1G3o7EDUmKHaZJAFF1vbDzkYWW7QTpBN45FwgntZB7a3v5mbymA8WyVyQXSBZ69wT__EAl7551iZE_mn6MOQZ2T5p6PEz-B11M5wLT0CKW8_gfspvYgQq5-uI_Rw7qoqqTrxf9FDXCrpcvNiM5IKER-x97Pnh0n7FPjCzwqu2KpiMtyJgRUhunX5e51V0tFmkXuA_NGPCYHZ2lihxwHokvr7G8nOICiUbYDh8DG)

**Volunteer of the Week** **Al Smith, Allentown PA.** Al is a volunteer who is a 3rd ward representative for Nazareth on the Northampton County Republican Committee. Al is a self-employed home improvement contractor life long conservative. He spends every weekend knocking on doors and staffing events for Team Scheller! Here is what Al has to say: "Lisa is a self-employed business owner and employs 150 people! She is not part of the disfunction that is Washington D.C. Since volunteering with Lisa I have broke bread and got to know her. She will be a great part of bringing Washington back to the people and dethroning Nancy Pelosi and the Squad. How can anybody not support Lisa Scheller? She will lead PA07 into greatness and will always make sure she put the Lehigh Valley first!"

Great work, Al! Thank you for your support. Hope you had a great weekend, Have a great Monday! -Team Scheller Paid for by Lisa Scheller for Congress, Inc. name: Miryam Lipper
subject: Who brags about being under federal investigation?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JON OSSOFF FOR SENATE
body:
David Perdue's panicked defense is a joke. |
---
As Jon Ossoff's Communications Director, I help craft responses to the onslaught of GOP attack ads -- and friend, this new one's a doozy.

Jon's opponent, David Perdue, is airing a new ad __explicitly acknowledging he's been under investigation by multiple federal agencies for his stock trading__ in January and February after the Senate received classified briefings on the threat of the coronavirus.

He doesn't even try to defend his actions, because they're indefensible. Instead, Perdue devotes his entire ad to bragging that he hasn't yet faced consequences.

**Friend, it's honestly PATHETIC that United States Senator Perdue is reduced to spending millions bragging on television that he hasn't been indicted for obviously unethical financial misconduct.**

**_David Perdue's panicked defense is a joke._**

**[Right now, Jon has a narrow lead in the polls. Chip in $20 to increase that lead and make sure Perdue doesn't get a second term.](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2f5f/5b2c1286/3a542e86/25f3e3c8/2252476961/VEsH/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_20_miryam_ad?refcode=em_2020_09_20_miryam_ad&amount=20")**
| | **[$10->](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2f5f/5b2c1286/3a542e86/25f3e3cb/2252476961/VEsE/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_20_miryam_ad?refcode=em_2020_09_20_miryam_ad&amount=10")**
---
| **[$20->](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2f5f/5b2c1286/3a542e86/25f3e3c8/2252476961/VEsF/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_20_miryam_ad?refcode=em_2020_09_20_miryam_ad&amount=20")**
---
| **[Other->](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2f5f/5b2c1286/3a542e86/25f3e3ca/2252476961/VEsC/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_20_miryam_ad?refcode=em_2020_09_20_miryam_ad")**
---

**Friend, the facts remain undeniable and disqualifying:**

While privy to private briefings on the true scope of the threat posed by this virus, Senator Perdue was not working to prepare his constituents -- _he was working to line his own pockets._

**_Perdue was trading stocks at three times his normal rate while lying to the public about COVID-19's health and economic risks and comparing it to the flu!_**

Friend, we know the kind of politician David Perdue is.

David Perdue serves himself and his donors, not the people.

**This fall, the people of Georgia have the opportunity to vote out this corrupt, self-dealing, two-faced politician -- and elect Jon Ossoff, an inspiring anti-corruption crusader who will bring new leadership to Washington.**

**[Can you make a donation today to help carry Jon's momentum through November?](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2f5f/5b2c1286/3a542e86/25f3e3ca/2252476961/VEsD/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_20_miryam_ad?refcode=em_2020_09_20_miryam_ad")**

Born and raised on a small farm in Nambe, New Mexico, by a union ironworker and a public school employee, Ben Ray is running for Senate to build a better future for all families.

Ben Ray knows that our communities are stronger when everyone has a fair shot. He's dedicated his career to creating good-paying jobs for hardworking New Mexicans, expanding health care, and protecting our natural resources.

As Assistant Speaker in the U.S. House of Representatives, Ben Ray has worked to pass a people-first agenda that helps all Americans -- from lowering prescription drug prices to preventing gun violence, protecting our immigrant communities, improving equity in our criminal justice system, and removing the dark influence of money in politics. He is proud to be endorsed by Planned Parenthood Action Fund, NARAL Pro-Choice America, AFSCME, American Nurses Association, League of Conservation Voters, Brady Campaign to End Gun Violence, Giffords, Human Rights Campaign, Latino Victory Fund, Congressional Black Caucus PAC, Council for a Livable World, and End Citizens United.

**Ben Ray doesn 't take a dollar from corporate PACs. Will you pitch in to fund our people-powered movement today?** **[DONATE MONTHLY](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b233/18e32a7f/4a9235cd/7b20dcc7/1428219829/VEsHBA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")** We know that we send you a lot of emails. If you would like to only receive the most important updates, [_click here_](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b233/18e32a7f/4a9235cd/7b20dcc4/1428219829/VEsHBw/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/fewer-emails").

If you would like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. You can keep up with our campaign by visiting us on _[Facebook](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b233/18e32a7f/4a9235cd/7b20dcc5/1428219829/VEsHBg/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.facebook.com/BenRayLujan/")_ or _[Twitter](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b233/18e32a7f/4a9235cd/7b20dcc1/1428219829/VEsHAQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://twitter.com/benraylujan")_ or _[Youtube](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b233/18e32a7f/4a9235cd/7b20dcc3/1428219829/VEsHAA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.youtube.com/c/benraylujan")_ or online at _[benraylujan.com](www.benraylujan.com)_. Click [_here_](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b233/18e32a7f/4a9235cd/7b20dcfa/1428219829/VEsHAw/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/unsubscribe") to unsubscribe and your request will be promptly processed.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dani?=
subject: Justice Ginsburg
body:
Democratic donors broke every fundraising record we had over the weekend. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/924b9823cf55/justice-ginsburg?e=140a9b81e7)
---
| |
---
| |
#
Democratic donors broke every fundraising record we had over the weekend. In the wake of a tragedy that for many people seemed like the dam breaking, people all over this country took up RBG’s torch of justice and redoubled efforts to champion equality and liberty.

This weekend, I spoke at a candlelight vigil in Justice Ginsburg’s honor and said this:

“Let each of our voices be louder and stronger for having been amplified by hers. **Let the forces of justice and righteousness overpower the forces of oppression and cruelty.”**

I had a moment Friday of feeling sad and feeling scared, but we do not have the luxury of moments to give to silence. We must act; we must knock every door and call every voter and bang every drum.

This country is counting on every one of us, and I am counting on every one of you.

[Will you commit to me today and double down on your dedication to being a champion for justice by making a donation?](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=4a2daa37d9&e=140a9b81e7)

In solidarity,
Dani
